title: Empowerment, Inc.
description:
We might think we are taking the steps to manifest more money, a happy relationship, peace with our family members, and being able to stick to a healthy diet…but unless that’s what is showing up, then something is probably getting lost in translation. This is the kind of relationship that most of us have with our own unconscious mind.  

NLP is the study of excellent communication–both with yourself, and with others. Neuro-Linguistic Programming is a user’s manual for your mind.  Learning NLP provides you with the tools and techniques to become fluent in that language of your mind so that your unconscious mind will finally understand what you actually want out of life. 

Our mission, put simply is to empower the planet. How does teaching NLP help us do that? Because after being in business for 40 years, we’ve spent that time gathering all of the best concepts and techniques to help you get in control of your mind, your emotional state, and your life.  Let Dr. Matt and the Empowerment, Inc. team guide you to achieve the results that you have struggled with in the past.  Whatever you think you are, you are more than that.

SUBSCRIBE FOR FULL ACCESS:

Empowered Membership Package 
Pay 9.99 a month with a 7-day free trial, auto renewing monthly.*

Vidapp - Connect, Motivate and Inspire

title: Stardust Period Tracker
description:
Stardust is a free period tracker and cycle tracker that helps you understand your period and every phase of your menstrual cycle. We blend science, ancient wisdom, astronomy, and AI to make period tracking feel simple, intuitive, and meaningful. Track your period, log symptoms, follow hormonal changes, discover how your cycle flows day by day, and sync with the moon. 

Whether you’re predicting your next period, spotting PMS patterns, or deepening your relationship with your menstrual cycle, Stardust is the cycle tracker that turns daily period tracking into real self-understanding.
Beyond period tracking, Stardust also supports ovulation prediction, fertility awareness, and pregnancy tracking. Use this cycle tracker to find fertile windows, plan or avoid pregnancy, track pregnancy symptoms, and explore how your cycle and hormones sync with the moon. From ovulation forecasts to Pregnancy Mode, Stardust goes beyond a standard period tracker to support your full hormonal journey.

Key features:
 • Personal daily insights based on your menstrual cycle and hormone patterns
 • Accurate predictions for your period, PMS, cravings, moods, and fertility
 • Social cycle tracker to sync period tracking with friends
 • Tools for cycle syncing and aligning your menstrual cycle with lunar phases
 • Moon calendar with symbolism and folklore mapped to your cycle
 • Invite partners to stay in sync with your period and hormonal voyage
 • Enhanced cycle tracking insights using sleep data

Pregnancy Mode is now available
 • Daily affirmations and symptom tracking throughout pregnancy
 • Weekly insights on health, exercise, nutrition, and ancient wisdom
 • Hormone and moon-based insights with zodiac sign matchups

Founded and led by women, Stardust is a period tracker built with privacy at its core. Your cycle data and menstrual cycle history are protected. We never sell or share your personal information.

PRIVACY POLICY & TERMS OF SERVICE
https://stardust.app/privacy-policy.html
https://stardust.app/terms-of-use.html

CONNECT WITH US 
Web - stardust.app
Instagram - @stardust 
Tiktok - @stardust.app

Note: Stardust should not be used as a birth control/contraception. The app does not substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of a qualified healthcare provider.

If you are having technical issues or have any questions about your cycle, we're here to help. Send an email to support@stardust.app
short_description: Menstrual cycle, pregnancy & hormone tracker synced with moon, built by women.

Are you annoyed by the "Who could it be?" stress whenever your phone rings or unnecessary spam calls? With Getcontact, those days are over. Filter your calls, focus only on the people you want to reach, and set your own boundaries in the digital world.

title: Abena AI: African AI Assistant
description: New: Free Phone Calls & Chat - No Internet, No Airtime needed Meet Abena. Africa's first hands-free Offline Voice Assistant. Made by Africans for Africa, to solve African problems Abena is fast and works without the internet. Just Say "Abena, Dɛn na wobetumi ayɛ?" Or “What you go fit do?“ *It supports the Ghanaian Akan Twi, Ghana English Accent, Nigerian English Accent and Pidgin English languages. Other African languages coming soon Speak to your phone in Twi or English or Ghana Pidgin English to make calls, check your credit(airtime) or internet data balance, buy or send credit, buy or send data, send money, check MTN Momo, Telecel cash, AT money balance, get weather info, get twitter trends or Ghana news, set reminders, set alarms, set timers, control smart home, smart lights like Philips hue bulbs, tv, record voice notes, send instant messages, chit-chat, open third party apps, play music, games like Twi Proverbs challenge Works like magic! Speak to your house to control lights & devices (Check out the Video). No need to rewire your home or require any electrician. It takes only 2 minutes to setup. Say "Abena, Sɔ kanea no ma me" or “On my lights gimme” Voice tech has become one of the main ways people interact with devices but the world’s most popular voice assistants, Siri, Alexa & Google Gemini, still don’t support a single native African language. Millions of people who speak African languages can’t use voice tech to do something as simple as checking the weather Abena is here to solve this problem. Abena isn't just a Twi Siri, Alexa or Twi ChatGPT clone - Abena solves problems faced by africans in Africa. Best part is - unlike other popular virtual assistants - Abena.ai works offline; saving you money & protecting your privacy. A voice assistant for African languages What can Abena do? Local Voice AI E.g ChatGPT in Twi or Pidgin English: Speak or type to chat in Twi, Pidgin English or Normal English with offline voice support. It's fast! Convert Video into local languages (Video Dubbing) Select videos, such as those in English or any language at all. Abena AI will magically convert and dub the videos into local language without any extra step. Just one click Text to Speech -Offline Audio Generation - Type, Paste Text to Generate Audio in local languages - Convert any website link to Audio - Upload a document to get Audio For voice-overs, audio books, eBook narration, podcasts, translations, twi translator, content creation, movie dubbing, education, entertainment, churches, tourism, sports commentary, news, ads etc -Twitter(X) trends & Ghana News? Abena AI can read out trends and Ghana news to you in Twi or English Weather Abena can provide weather forecast from any location. English to Twi translator Twi to English translator Check Credit or Airtime balance: (No internet required) You can check MTN/Telecel/AT Credit without internet: Buy Credit or Airtime: (No internet) Buy MTN airtime, Telecel, AT credit without internet Transfer Credit or Airtime Send credit or airtime to others without internet Check MOMO balance (All networks) Check Momo or Mobile money balance without internet. All networks, MTN MoMo, Telecel cash, AirtelTigo Money Transfer Money: Transfer MoMo to other users, no internet. Also buy data, transfer data, check data balance Set Reminders: Set reminders Set Alarms: Set alarms, timers etc Smart Home (Control lights) Connect Abena AI to smart home devices like the Philips hue lights and hub and control such devices just by talking in your local language Twi Proverbs Battle, akan proverbs etc *Accessibility Service api is used by Abena AI for screen reading to enable blind or visually impaired Ghanaians check their call credit & data plans. Abena does this by e.g dialing USSD short code *124# and reading out loud the call credit/data text upon a voice command
short_description: Offline AI Voice Assistant. Talk to your phone in Twi English to get things done

title: Canary Mail - AI Email App
description:
Canary is the AI email app made to help you do more with your conversations. Draft emails, prioritize threads, silence spam, and more in just a few taps. Avoid manually organizing your different accounts and manage your contacts, files and profiles all in one place. Say hello to a better, faster way to send your digital mail. Say hello to your Inbox Copilot!

With Canary, you can compose emails with just a tap thanks to Copilot AI generated suggestions. Write professional emails easily with sentence recommendations and custom drafts that Canary saves when frequently used. Our AI helper can also help you organize conversations, manage calendar events, and send you smart notifications for only the most important conversations. Canary introduces a smart alternative to multiple mail apps.

You can also start a chat directly with your Inbox Copilot AI assistant for the most efficient way to interact with your mail. Just ask to unsubscribe from newsletters, get a summary of people or topics that have appeared in emails, see a list of your highest priority emails, and more!

Safely mail client letters, contracts, important documents, and more with PGP encryption, keeping your conversations private. With Canary, you can contact everyone from any of your emails with universal account support – from Gmail, iCloud, Office365, and more! Pin important emails at the top of your inbox and set up your favorites for easy access to the people that matter most. Canary brings you an AI email experience designed to work for you.

Download Canary today for a smart and innovative new way to manage emails to get more done.

CANARY FEATURES

CONVERSATIONAL AI EMAIL ASSISTANT
- Avoid time wasted sifting through emails with summaries of any person or topic
- Get a recap of important details like upcoming bills or contacts waiting for a response 
- Never miss an appointment with AI powered calendar functionality
- Quick access to powerful mail management tools

SEND EMAILS SEAMLESSLY
- Access all of your mail contacts and information easily in one place
- Universal support lets you link all your accounts to one incorporated inbox
- Get notified as soon as your emails are read with read receipts
- Draft easily with previously used templates for repeat emails

AI EMAIL ASSISTANT
- Write emails with the help of Canary’s AI powered app and get quick suggestions
- Our email app helps you organize contacts, threads, and accounts in just a tap
- Receive smart notifications for the most important conversations
- Get access to custom thread actions that best suit your workflow

MAIL APP THAT WORKS FOR YOU
- PGP encryption keeps all of your conversations private and secure
- Manage mail threads, calendars, and events all in one app
- Compose emails without the eye strain, thanks to Canary’s new true dark composer
- Snooze emails, review attachments, manage conversations easily. The possibilities are endless.

Download Canary for an all-in-one email tool made to help you get more done when it matters. Explore the power of the ultimate AI email assistant.

Privacy Policy: https://canarymail.io/privacy.html

title: Expiry Notify Product Scanner
description:
Add your products and receive notifications before expiration date! You won’t forget about products anymore on your shelf so they won't expire!

Xpiry brings a minimalistic, simple and innovative way for you to get notified before your products expire! Easily add products, keep tracking of them and customise the periods of time when to receive notifications before one expires.

Generate food recipes ideas based on your selected expiring products with the help of AI ChatGPT support! Generate PDF file with your products.

Simple, easy to use and straightforward to the point! Xpiry provides an all-in-one expiration management system. Night (dark) mode supported!

It solves the problem of wasting your products.

Features:

- Add products. You can set product name, expiration date, category, quantity, notes and add a photo of the product (take picture or save get from gallery). You can save the product only if you select the expiration date!
- Set notifications trigger time before they expire
- Get a notification for each expiring product. Notifications will be fired automatically based on your settings inside Xpiry
- View the list of your expiring products
- Generate up to 5 food recipes based on your selected products using ChatGPT support
- Generate PDF file with products based on your sorting preferences
- Sort the list by name, date added or expiration date
- Search products by name
- Filter products by category
- Swipe left to delete a product and then you can undo the deletion of a product
- Swipe right to edit a product

- Have more options to set the time for getting notified
- Select after how many days Xpiry should auto delete expired products
- Set hour and minute for when to get the notifications
- Set the date format displayed in the application
- Add and remove categories
- Support for multiple languages: English (en), Arabic (ar), Spanish (es), French (fr), Hindi (hi), Indonesian (in), Italian (it), Japanese (ja), Korean (ko), Malay (ms), Filipino (phi), Portuguese (pt), Romanian (ro), Russian (ru), and Chinese (zh)

title: Birdbuddy: ID & Collect Birds
description:
Birdbuddy is the world’s most recognized app for discovering and learning about birds – whether you’re using our smart bird feeder in your backyard or identifying birds anywhere with just your phone.

Powered by artificial intelligence, Birdbuddy instantly recognizes bird species by photo or sound. Snap a picture, record a song, or let the smart feeder do the work for you. Get alerts when a bird visits, receive collectible postcard photos, and learn fascinating facts about each species.

Join a global community of bird lovers and enjoy live bird photos from 500,000+ feeders in over 120 countries – all while contributing valuable data to bird conservation efforts.

Key Features:
• Identify birds by photo or sound – Use your phone’s camera or microphone to get an instant ID. No feeder required.
• Smart feeder integration – Pair with the Birdbuddy feeder for automatic photos, videos, alerts, and postcards.
• Collect and learn – Build your collection with each new bird. Explore facts about appearance, diet, calls, and more.
• Explore a global birdwatching network – Discover moments of nature shared by our community.
• Support conservation – Each bird you identify helps researchers track populations and migrations.

Birdbuddy brings the joy of birdwatching to curious beginners and seasoned nature lovers alike. Whether you’re exploring your backyard or out on a trail, Birdbuddy helps you connect with birds — and the world around you.
short_description: Identify birds by sound, photo or camera - or connect a Birdbuddy smart feeder.

title: Salem
description:
Introduction to the application
It is an application that aims to teach children how to pronounce Arabic letters and words until how to  recite Surat Al-Fatihah .. within an interesting story for children, using of the state of the art Artificial Intelligence techniques of Speech Recognition with automatic correction for the child when reading the letters and words or when reciting Surat Al-Fatehah

The main idea of the application
The application is in the form of a story that revolves around a hero named (Salem), a sports hero who enjoys high energy, intelligence and good manners. Through the application, he seeks to recover the boxes of light that were stolen by a group of evil creatures and flew those creatures to the forest. The hero accompanies his friend ( a funny bird ) on a journey full of excitement to recover the boxes.
During the Hero's journey, he learns Arabic letters and words, plays various games, and then at the end of his journey he learns to recite the Al-Fatehah 

Application contents
* Levels of graduated difficulty
* Interesting educational lessons
* Fun and useful animations
* Lots of of games
* and more

The current version of the application
Thanks to ALLAH , this preliminary introductory version of the app has been completed, and it is a limited version, to be followed by successive versions, Inshaa ALLAH.
short_description: - Teaching kids Arabic Alphabet and the recitation of Al-Fateha in an easy way
recent_changes_text: Teaching kids the Arabic Letters and their forms and how to pronounce them with different Diacritics (Fatha , Damma , and Kasra) , In addition to Teaching the recitation of Al-fateha

title: Learn Chinese - 11,000 Words
description: Learn Chinese from 61 native languages, for free & offline, with FunEasyLearn. Learn to READ 📖 WRITE ✍ and SPEAK Chinese 💬 Discover the fun & easy way to learn all the reading rules, all the words you’ll ever need and all the useful phrases in the Chinese language. 🚀 Contents • 6,000 Chinese words (constantly growing): the most common nouns, verbs, adjectives, etc., categorized into 7 levels and 200 topics; • 5,000 Chinese phrases (frequently used): the most important phrases for daily conversations and travelling, categorized into 10 levels and 120 topics. Enhance your vocabulary by learning words, sentences and expressions for beginner, intermediate and advanced learners. 🔔 Why learn Chinese with FunEasyLearn? FunEasyLearn reinvents language learning. Our team of linguists and teachers have developed a unique language learning strategy. The secret lies in combining an alphabet with all the reading rules, all the necessary words and a practical phrasebook into one app. This allows our users to read a word or phrase, pronounce it correctly, associate it with an illustration and practice it with listening, writing and speaking games. 🏆 Top features Hand-drawn illustrations – memorize the new vocabulary faster with intuitive illustrations; Professional audio recordings – listen to audios recorded by native speakers; Detailed statistics – analyze your results and track your progress; Review manager – review everything you learn; Smart search – find quickly the words and phrases you need; Hide what you know – hide the content you already know; Speech recognition – improve your pronunciation; Offline – use the app anywhere in the world, with no internet connection. 💼 Chinese for business Get access to special Mandarin lessons created for your business. We provide specialized courses for taxi drivers, hotel & restaurant staffs, flight-attendants, shop-assistants, etc. ✈ Chinese for travelling Learn how to book a hotel room, order a meal in a restaurant, ask for directions, carry out a conversation and speak confidently with the native speakers. 🙌 Chinese for adults We adapt the contents depending on the age of the learner. Both you and your kid can learn Mandarin and have fun. FunEasyLearn Free Subscription Subscribe for FREE, with the flowers you earn while playing language learning games. Learn Chinese, play for free! It’s fast & easy. 📴 📥 Download the FunEasyLearn Chinese course right now! Recommend the app to your friends and get a reward. Rate us and write a review ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ It would mean a lot to our team! Contact us: https://www.FunEasyLearn.com/

title: Aviso AI
description:
Aviso’s AI-powered mobile app brings together predictive forecasting, pipeline management, deal guidance, conversational intelligence and other capabilities to help revenue teams close more revenue and lower CRM burden and cost. Using the power of Aviso’s predictive machine learning platform, revenue team members, from CFOs and CROs, to Sales Managers and Revenue Operations, to Field reps and Go-to-Market team members can accelerate growth, win more deals, and reduce risk:

- Apply individual and team forecast judgment across any business, product, or team hierarchy
- Track progress towards quota attainment with a real-time AI pacing chart
- Get a quick overview of your business at a single glance
- Update deals and forecasts directly into Aviso and sync directly to CRM
- Inspect pipeline health and quality and get visibility across run rate business
- Get conversation insights for offline and online meetings
- Take early actions to update next steps and via contextual nudges and daily digests
- Send and log emails with native CRM integration
- Call any CRM contact and create post-meeting tasks or events
- Keep a pulse across your deals and account portfolio 

Aviso AI delivers integrated revenue intelligence to Sales and GTM teams. With demonstrated results across industry leaders such as Honeywell, Seagate, Elastic, Armis, RingCentral, and Marlin Equity Partners, Aviso works at the frontier of AI across deep learning, speech recognition, decision science, and computer vision and has generated over 505B insights, analyzed over $1Trillion in the pipeline, and over $550B total won deals across our customers.

Interested in knowing more about how Aviso can act as One platform for all your revenue operations? Visit us at https://www.aviso.ai
short_description: Guided Selling for Accelerated Revenue Growth

title: Firstrade: Invest & Trade
description:
One Platform, Unlimited Opportunities.

Firstrade App offers all the investment products you need, all commission-free - Invest in Stocks/ETFs and Options.

COMMISSION-FREE TRADING

ZERO Commission trades on Stocks/ETFs, Options and Mutual Funds
ZERO Options contract fees. Trade Options easily and securely
No minimum deposit requirement for Brokerage and IRA Accounts
No inactivity Fees

MANAGE MULTIPLE ACCOUNTS IN ONE APP

Brokerage Account
Sign-up for a brokerage account & invest in a wide selection of asset types, including stocks/ETFs, options.
No-Fee IRAs
Grow your retirement savings with a Traditional, Roth, or Rollover IRA. Enjoy the benefit of no annual, setup, or maintenance fees.

TRADE SMARTER, FASTER

Fractional share trading - Invest in your favorite company's stocks with as little as $5 to get started.
Real-time quotes, company profiles, historical charts, news and event calendars.
Centralize your research and boost confidence in your financial analysis with FirstradeGPT, a personal AI-powered copilot that empowers trading decision-making.
Get AI-driven sentiment analysis with Market Buzz, including Sentiment Scores and Signals. Access stock details, performance analysis, and trade directly from the new "Analysis" feature.
Identify trends and patterns quickly with Technical Insight®, featuring "Most Popular," "Trending Now," "Most Viewed Bullish," and "Most Viewed Bearish" lists. Access stock analysis from the Overview and Markets pages.
Discover and invest in stocks categorized by themes like 5G, AI, Autonomous Vehicles, Defense, ESG, and more.
Make smarter options trades with rolling options.
View key metrics with the options analytics tool: Greeks, IV, Max Profit/Loss & Breakeven.
Track price movements with custom price alerts
Switch advanced charts to landscape view and add indicator overlays for precise stock tracking.
Uncover investment opportunities through premium research from Morningstar and Trading Central, complemented by real-time news updates.
 
Trade beyond market hours with extended hours and overnight trading: 
Day+ Extended Hours: (8 AM to 8 PM ET)
Overnight trading hours: from 8 PM – 4AM ET, Sunday to Friday
 
Available on mobile, iPad and desktop. House all your investments under one roof and diversify your stocks, options & mutual fund investments. Create an Individual Brokerage account or IRA account on Firstrade to start your investment journey today!

RELIABLE & SECURE

Our customer support representatives are ready to assist you via phone and email. We protect your personal information using advanced encryption and cybersecurity technologies. Firstrade Securities, Inc. has been a member of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), Securities Investor Protection Corporation (SIPC) and Financial Industry Regulatory Authority (FINRA) since 1985. Securities in your account are insured by SIPC for up to $500,000 (including $250,000 for claims for cash).

DISCLOSURES
Firstrade Securities Inc. offers free trade for stocks/ETFs, options, and mutual funds through its mobile application and website. Relevant SEC & FINRA or other fees may still apply. Please see Firstrade’s Pricing and Fee Schedule at https://www.firstrade.com/trading/pricing to learn more.

No content in the Firstrade App shall be considered a recommendation or solicitation for the purchase or sale of securities, options or other investment products, and all information provided is for reference only.

Securities products and services offered by Firstrade Securities Inc., Member FINRA/SIPC, are not insured by the FDIC and are subject to investment risk, including the possible loss of the principal invested.

title: ID Austria
description:
The "ID Austria" app allows you to sign documents with your electronic identity and also log in to digital applications.

Authentication is the focus
The "ID Austria" app focuses on fast and secure identification and authentication with your ID Austria.

Guide to numerous services
The app offers an easy route to government services and services from private companies that can be used with your ID Austria.

Access to your personal data
The "My Personal Data" feature allows you to view extensive personal data from the ID Austria system, such as registration or ID data.

EU-wide use of administrative services
ID Austria can also be used outside of Austria for online applications in other EU member states. You can also use the app to confirm registrations with digital administrative services in other EU countries.

How to use the "ID Austria" app:
1. Download the free app.
2. Link your ID Austria or the electronic identity card (eID) of another EU member state to the app.
3. You can now enjoy all the benefits of the "ID Austria" app without restrictions.

Your benefits:
• Conveniently access digital government services and business services online at any time
• Access online services from various providers using your ID Austria login credentials
• View your own personal data, such as registration or ID card details
• Use your device password/device PIN code as an identification factor in addition to biometrics
• If you have any questions, ask chatbot Mona for help

ID Austria is the next generation of the mobile phone signature. If you don't yet have ID Austria, you can find comprehensive information at https://www.id-austria.gv.at/. This section also provides information about the ongoing app development.
short_description: ID Austria is your key to administrative and business services.

title: Sea battle 2: Warship Online
description:
Sea Battle 2 is the ultimate battleship and naval combat game where you can battle players from around the globe, build your own port city, and customize your fleet! Relive the classic board game from your childhood with exciting new features and modern gameplay.

⚓ ONLINE BATTLES

Challenge players worldwide in real-time naval combat! Test your strategy and tactics to sink their fleet before they sink yours.

⚓ BUILD YOUR PORT CITY

Create a thriving port city with military bases, shipyards, factories, and iconic landmarks. Unlock new buildings and rewards as you progress!

⚓ CUSTOMIZE YOUR FLEET

Personalize your battleships and arsenal with unique skins, ranging from World War I classics to modern designs. Choose your fleet's name, avatar, and flag to stand out on the battlefield.

⚓ RANK UP & BECOME AN ADMIRAL

Win battles to climb the ranks and earn prestigious titles, from Sailor to Admiral. Prove your skills and dominate the leaderboards!

⚓ PLAY WITH FRIENDS

Invite friends to play online or via Bluetooth. You can even play on the same device, taking turns to outsmart each other.

⚓ TRAIN WITH AI

Hone your skills by battling AI opponents. Choose from different difficulty levels to prepare for real-world challenges.

⚓ TOURNAMENTS & TROPHIES

Compete in thrilling tournaments, win trophies, and showcase your achievements in your trophy room.

⚓ MULTIPLE GAME MODES

Choose between classic mode or advanced mode with additional weapons and strategies.

⚓ CHAT & EMOJIS

Communicate with opponents during battles using chat and emojis. Trash-talk or make allies—it's up to you!

⚓ GLOBAL LEADERBOARDS

Climb the ranks and become the top player in the world based on your victories!

Sea Battle 2 combines nostalgic notebook-style graphics with modern effects, creating a unique and unforgettable strategy game experience. The game is free to play, with optional in-app purchases for additional content.

---

The time has come to prove who rules the seas!

Download Sea Battle 2 now and start your naval combat adventure!

Follow us on Instagram for updates: https://www.instagram.com/byril_games/
short_description: Command your fleet in epic battleship battles! Play online & dominate the seas!

title: Learn German for beginners
description:
ENGO is a unique and effective German language learning app. Learn German in context with entertaining books & stories at your level. Build your German vocabulary with smart flashcards from topics you enjoy the most.

Download Engo FREE and start learning German today! 🇩🇪

Key Features:

Interactive Reading: Read German books and translate words instantly.

Vocabulary Building: Learn new German words and phrases.

Flashcards: Use flashcards to remember vocabulary.

Video Learning: Watch German videos, movies, and TV shows with subtitles.

Structured Courses: Complete A1, A2, B1, and B2 level courses.

Pronunciation Practice: Improve your German pronunciation with feedback.

Speaking Practice: Engage in real-life scenarios to practice speaking.


Easily read and listen to German anytime, anywhere. Just 5 minutes a day and one story each day to learn German faster. 

Complete Courses for All Levels
ENGO offers comprehensive courses for all levels: A1, A2, B1, and B2. These courses cover everything from basic grammar and vocabulary to advanced language skills. Each level is designed to build on the previous one, ensuring a smooth learning curve.

Improve Pronunciation
ENGO includes features to help you improve your German pronunciation. With speech recognition technology, you can practice speaking and get instant feedback. This way, you can sound more like a native speaker and improve your confidence in speaking German.

Real-Life Speaking Scenarios
Practice speaking German in real-life scenarios with ENGO. Our app provides interactive exercises that simulate real conversations. This helps you become more comfortable using German in everyday situations, from ordering food at a restaurant to asking for directions.

Learn New Words
Our app offers a vast library of German words for you to learn. You can explore new vocabulary and practice it in various ways to ensure you remember it. ENGO’s intuitive design makes learning German fun and effective.

Flashcards for Memory
ENGO uses flashcards to help you remember German words. Flashcards are a proven method for memorizing vocabulary, and with ENGO, you can create custom flashcards or use our pre-made sets. This way, you can learn German words at your own pace.

Watch Videos with Subtitles
Improve your listening skills by watching German videos, movies, and TV shows with subtitles. This feature helps you understand spoken German in different contexts, making it easier to learn the language naturally. You can follow along with the subtitles and learn new phrases and expressions.

Read and Translate
With ENGO, you can read German books and easily translate words you don’t understand. Each story includes a quiz to practice grammar, vocabulary, and articles (der, die, das). Retake quizzes to improve reading comprehension and prepare for exams like Goethe, DSH, TestDaF, and TELC.

A must-have app for learning German for travel, daily life, or exam preparation. ENGO is your best companion for mastering German!

Download today and start learning German fast and easily with ENGO!
short_description: ENGO: German language learning with 100+ books & stories, grammar, speaking

title: Orion - Horoscope & Tarot
description:
Unlock daily guidance and self-discovery with Orion — the all-in-one astrology & tarot app powered by advanced AI. Get accurate daily horoscopes, in-depth birth-chart insights, on-demand tarot readings, a soulmate sketch, compatibility checks, dream interpretation, numerology, and a complete lunar calendar — all in one place.

Personalized Horoscope & Astrology
Orion delivers ultra-personalized horoscopes (daily, weekly, monthly, yearly) for every zodiac sign: Aries, Taurus, Gemini, Cancer, Leo, Virgo, Libra, Scorpio, Sagittarius, Capricorn, Aquarius, Pisces. Insights adapt to your birth chart (natal chart) and preferences, covering love, relationships, career, money, health, and wellbeing. Track trends, transits, and energy shifts to plan your day with confidence.

AI Astrologer & Instant Chat
Chat 24/7 with your AI-powered astrologer and get clear, friendly answers in seconds. Ask anything: daily horoscope follow-ups, compatibility advice, birth-chart analysis, retrogrades explained, lucky days, timing tips, or “what should I focus on today?”. It’s like having an astrologer in your pocket.

Tarot Readings & Spiritual Guidance
Draw tarot cards for instant clarity. Explore Card of the Day, 3-Card Spread (past/present/future), Love Tarot, Career Tarot, and the classic Celtic Cross. Learn card meanings, combine tarot guidance with your horoscope, and use spreads to navigate decisions about love, destiny, and work — perfect for beginners and advanced readers alike.

Soulmate Sketch & Compatibility
Ever wondered what your soulmate looks like? Answer a few quick questions and receive a personalized Soulmate Sketch based on real astrology. Then check compatibility reports for love, friendship, and work with any zodiac sign. Use the soulmate test to discover who truly matches your energy.

Lunar Calendar & Moon Phases
Stay in tune with the Moon: New, Waxing, Full, and Waning phases at a glance. See when the Moon enters your sign and how each phase can influence mood, motivation, and relationships. Plan rituals, intentions, or important conversations with lunar timing on your side.

Numerology & Dream Interpretation
Decode repeating numbers, life-path themes, and personal cycles with easy numerology readings. Log your dreams and get instant interpretations and symbols explained directly in chat — alongside tarot and astrology context.

Daily Quotes & Self-Discovery
Start each day inspired with a hand-picked quote and micro-coaching tips. Read practical articles on boundaries, attachment styles, communication, and mindful habits — personalized by sign and current transits.

Questions or feedback? hi@orion.app
Privacy Policy: https://orion.app/privacypolicy
Terms of Service: https://orion.app/tos

title: Spider Identifier: Insect ID
description:
Spider identifier is a community application along with Machine Learning algorithms that will help you correctly identify any species of spiders 
Key Features:
- Instantly Identify 1000+ species of spiders
- Identification accuracy rate of 90.28%
- Rich learning source about insects
- Intuitive interface with friendly tips
- Keep track of identified species in your personal collection.
- Read blogs on different Species of spider
- Post your questions and get answered by specialists


Welcome to Spider Finder: Insect Identifier – Your Ultimate Companion for Exploring the Fascinating World of Spiders and Insects!

Are you fascinated by the world of insects and spiders? Do you encounter these tiny creatures and wonder about their names, characteristics, and potential risks? Look no further, because the "Identify Spider: Bug Finder" app is here to satisfy your curiosity and help you navigate the world of bugs and insects like never before!

Spider identification app give Predictions on a spider's biology, behavior, and ecology that can be made as soon as you know your order. But how do you know which order a spider belongs to? A spider can be identified in several ways. Get the Picture Insect Spider app today and join a community of over 3 million insect enthusiasts worldwide.

Bug Identifier:
Whether you're a nature enthusiast, a curious observer, or simply someone who wants to learn more about the bugs and insects around you, our insect app provides a bug identification experience. With the latest advancements in image recognition technology, simply snap a picture of the bug or insect you've encountered, and let our app do the rest! From identifying spiders to other creepy crawlies, we've got you covered.

Photo Cam for Quick Identification: 
Photo Cam feature lets you snap pictures of bugs and spiders on the go. No need to browse through your gallery – capture and identify insects and spiders in real time with ease.

Bug and Spider Chart:
Compare species side by side, and gain insights into their similarities and differences. Become a bug and spider expert with a few swipes!

Insect and Spider Database: 
With an extensive database featuring thousands of species, you'll discover a world of fascinating creatures at your fingertips. Explore detailed information on each insect and spider, including taxonomy, behavior, habitat, and more.
Insect and Spider Finder: 
Whether you're out in nature, exploring your garden, or just curious about the critters in your home, our app is your trusty insect and spider finder.

Picture Insect and Spider: 
Share your bug and spider discoveries with friends and fellows. Our bug app allows you to share pictures of your finds directly from the app, fostering a community of bugs and spiders.

Learning Hub for Bugs and Spiders:
Identify Spider: Bug Finder isn't just about identifying bugs; it's about learning and exploration. With detailed descriptions, high-quality images, and even audio clips, you'll gain a deeper understanding of these fascinating creatures that share our world.

Bug Bites and Spider Bites: 
Worried about insect or spider bites? Our app provides essential information on common bug bites and spider bites, including symptoms and first aid tips. Stay informed and protect yourself and your loved ones from danger.

Bug Identification Made Easy: 
No more sifting through field guides or searching the web for answers. Bug Finder simplifies bug identification with a user-friendly interface and lightning-fast results.

User-Friendly and Interactive:
Navigating the app is a breeze, thanks to its user-friendly interface and interactive features. Use the spider chart to identify spider species, compare different bugs and insects side by side, and even test your own identification skills with the integrated quizzes and challenges.

Become the ultimate bug and spider expert with Identify Insect: Spider Finder – your insect and spider identification companion!
short_description: Spider identifier using camera and community that will help you identify spiders

title: Vietnamese English Dictionary
description:
Burn the words like a dragon with Dragoma!
 
The free Offline Vietnamese English Dictionary & Translator application. Internet connection is not required! If you want to learn Vietnamese or English the most effective way, there's no better choice than Dragoma! Dragoma shows the definition/meaning of Vietnamese or English words as pop up without opening dictionary app ever. No hassle of switching between apps. You can look up word definitions while reading PDFs/e-books while browsing the internet and even while playing games. Just copy the word, Dragoma dictionary will show you the meaning/translation. 
 
Welcome to download the Offline Vietnamese English Dictionary & Translator / Offline Tiếng Anh Tiếng Việt Tự điển & Người dịch
 
Features:
 
♦ Super Search with pop-up button/hover button/floating button.
♦ Example sentences translation.
♦ Voice recognition on Dictionary and Translator.
♦ Audio pronunciations.
♦ native speakers’ pronunciations with videos.
♦ Flashcards - Memorise basic vocabulary effectively!
♦ Favorites
♦ Notes. Take notes about the words.
♦ Random words.
♦ Tests.
♦ Search option is working on both Vietnamese - English  and English - Vietnamese directions.
 
Super Search:
1. Select and hold the word you would like to get the definition for.
2. Click on the “copy” option from the Options Menu.
3. Meaning (translation) and a pop-up button will be shown right there on the screen.
 
 
Required Permissions:
 
INTERNET – if text-to-speech (TTS) is not available, app needs to be online. Example translations, Videos for native speakers’ pronunciation and online machine translator also needs to be online. And to show the ads to support the free version.
SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW – app needs this permission to show the floating icon on other screens with super search option.
RECEIVE_BOOT_COMPLETED – required to start the super search on system restart so that users do not need to start super search feature manually every time they restart the system.
 
ABOUT Dragoma
 
Web site: 
http://www.dragoma.com 
 
Facebook:

Twitter: 
http://twitter.com/dragomacom
 
Instagram:

The text-to-speech (TTS) technology may not be available in some devices. To check if your phone is able of speech synthesis: Menu -> Settings -> Voice input & output -> Text-to-speech settings.

title: Burkozel HD Online
description: Burkozel is a card game and a variation of the game Bura. The objective of the game is simple: to collect the most tricks. Burkozyol is played with 2 to 4 people. In our version, you will find: Online: ★ Online mode for 2 to 4 players, you can play with friends through private tables ☆ Ability to play shortened games (up to 6 or 8 points) ★ Pair versus pair game mode ☆ You can enable or disable reshuffling or playing in the dark ★ In-game chat (can be turned off in table settings) ☆ Ability to add users to friends and communicate with them outside of the online game Offline: ★ Advanced intelligence of bots ☆ Additional settings: the ability to play in the dark or reshuffle when the player has all 4 cards of the same suit In addition, the game features: ★ Great graphics ☆ Many sets of cards and game tables A little bit about the game: There are many card games where you need to take tricks. The most famous ones are Preference, Goat, Bura, Thousand, King, Deberc, and among them, Burkozel. Burkozel is an intellectual game. Winning this game on luck alone is difficult. You need to adhere to certain strategies, analyze possible combinations in the hands of opponents, and remember the cards that have been played. In our version of the game, you can play without the internet, in which case the role of opponents will be played by artificial intelligence. The game has quite complex and interesting rules. Their description is in the game itself, and if you have never played Burkozyol, we strongly recommend that you first familiarize yourself with them. Have a great game!
short_description: A classic card game with beautiful graphics and a variety of game modes

title: Grifols Plasma Donor Hub
description:
Your Plasma Donation experience just got smoother! 🩸✨ Grifols DonorHubTM is your go-to place for all your plasma donor needs. 
Use Grifols DonorHub™ to:
• 📊 Check your donation and compensation history - Details of your most recent donation are available in Grifols DonorHub™ 24 hours after your visit. 
• 📲 Stay up-to-date on all things Grifols Plasma- Enable push notifications to never miss an update. 
• 💡 Receive tips to help prepare for your next plasma donation. 
• 🔍 Learn what happens to your plasma after your donation. 
• 📅 Schedule your donation appointments.
• Refer a Friend: Spread the Word & Earn Rewards: Easily refer friends and family to become plasma donors.
• Ask the Chatbot any question you have


Tips for a Better Donation Experience
1.	Drink at least 12-to-24 ounces of water or a sports drink 30-to-60 minutes before your donation. Proper hydration helps ensure the procedure is well-tolerated and recovery is quicker.
2.	Limit caffeinated beverages and milk on the day of your donation, as they reduce iron absorption and can elevate your pulse.
3.	Avoid alcohol the day before and the day of your donation to prevent dehydration.
4.	Avoid foods high in saturated fats and cholesterol the night before your donation, as they can make the donation process longer.
5.	Get a good night’s rest before your donation to aid in quicker recovery.
6.	Discontinue and avoid all tobacco products before donating, as they may increase your blood pressure and heart rate.
Getting started is easy:
If you're already registered in Grifols DonorHub™:
Just download the app and log in! The Grifols DonorHub™ app has all the features found in the web version. If you're not registered yet:
Download the Grifols DonorHub™ app.
Register for Grifols DonorHub™: Enter your registration number, name, date of birth, mobile phone number, email address, and choose a password.
Don’t forget to turn on notifications for Grifols DonorHub™!
Stay connected with us:
🌐 Visit our website: https://www.grifolsplasma.com/en/donor-hub 
📘 Follow us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/grifolsplasma1940 
📸 Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/grifolsplasma_us/?locale=fr 
💬 Join our WhatsApp channel:  https://www.whatsapp.com/channel/0029VacoAHFHltYELrquem3R

The lyrics of this song inspired us to create a remake of the game called FLY - Sopwith Camel from the ’80 of the last century about a cool small airplane. Simple and clear mechanics of the game are able to fascinate you for hours of fun.

Fasten your seat belts, put on your helmet, goggles and get ready for a flight. Your trouble-free heavy machine gun and your favorite bombs will surely lead you to success. Your seemingly simple warplane is capable to force to reckon with yourself and become a real bomber, bringing destruction to your enemies from behind the clouds or hitting targets in the midst of the clear sky. You are not holding a simulator -  you are holding in your hands some stunning explosions, air chases, incessant shots and fantastic air pirouettes.

title: Arccos
description:
Arccos, golf’s #1 on-course tracking system, is the official game tracker of the PGA TOUR. Arccos provides the ability for golfers to capture their performance on more than 40,000 courses worldwide and track their game just like the pros. 

By simply pairing Arccos’ Smart Sensors with the Arccos App, golfers can automatically capture their on-course shots and receive personalized, tour-level data such as strokes gained analytics and smart club distances. Along with player-specific analytics, Arccos provides other powerful yet simple features including an A.I.-powered GPS rangefinder and custom caddie advice. By integrating automatic shot tracking and artificial intelligence Arccos can help golfers play smarter, shoot lower scores, and improve even faster. In fact, new members improve on average by 5.71 strokes within their first year.

Since its inception, Arccos members have collectively taken over 750 million shots across more than 16 million rounds, contributing to the largest on-course dataset in golf, which now encompasses an astounding 1.1 trillion unique data points.

The pioneer of big data and Artificial Intelligence for golf, Arccos Golf LLC is revolutionizing the golfing experience. Its automatic shot-tracking platform delivers unparalleled insights that help players maximize their potential. Players may track their shots using their phone, Arccos Link wearable, or Apple Watch. See your GPS distance with our Wear OS app.

Listed among the “World’s Most Innovative Companies” by Fast Company, ranking #3 in the Sports category globally. Arccos’ official partners include PING, TaylorMade, Cobra Golf, Srixon / Cleveland Golf, Club Champion, Me And My Golf, EA Sports and Golf Digest.

Elevate your Arccos Experience with LINK: 
The small, ultralight wearable allows Arccos players to capture their shot data without having to carry a phone on the course. LINK seamlessly pairs with the Arccos app and sensors. Worn on a player’s belt, waistband, or pocket, it tracks shots in real-time – including the club used and precise location – and automatically transfers the data to a player’s phone via Bluetooth, either during or after the round. This allows golfers to play the game their way, freeing them to keep their phone in a cart, bag, back pocket, or elsewhere.
short_description: Golf On-Course Shot Tracking System
recent_changes_text: Stability improvements and bug fixes

title: 4 In A Row: Tic Tac Toe
description:
Welcome to the classic game 4 In A Row: Tic Tac Toe - Online Multiplayer, play with friends.
Who has not played this popular game in his childhood?
Online Multiplayer, play with friends.
The objective of the game is to connect 4 tiles of your color on the same line (vertical, horizontal or diagonal).
The chips or discs always fall from top to bottom as a result of the force of gravity.
Touch on a column to drop the tile of your color.
NEW: Now available a puzzles module. Resolve all the levels and nobody will beat you.

There are two game modes:
- "One player": You will play against the AI (Artificial Intelligence). There are 10 levels of difficulty. Will you be able to connect a 4-in-a-row against the most "intelligent" robot?
- "Two players": The classic duel in which each player is playing by turns their color chips. The first one that connects 4 in line wins.

What about our game:
- Game Connect Four, Connect 4 is FREE.
- Game Connect Four, Four In A Row is easy play for all ages.
- Game Four In A Row, 4 In A Row is awesome graphics && UI/UX.
- Game 4 In A Row, Connect Four helps you connect with anyone to play games.
- Game Connect Four ,4 In A Row play with awesome AI .

If you like this game (4 In A Row: Tic Tac Toe), please rate it and leave a comment. I am an indie game developer and your support means a lot to me! Thank you for your help! If you don't like something in the game, please email me at ttienqb@gmail.com and tell me why. I want to hear your feedback and comments so I can continue to make this game better.

We hope you will enjoy the puzzles just as we enjoyed creating them for the game: 4 In A Row: Tic Tac Toe.
short_description: 4 In A Row: Tic Tac Toe - Challenge AI
recent_changes_text:
Improve performance & fix bugs monthly.
Have fun ^^

title: Voca Scanner - Word Quiz
description:
Have you ever found yourself spending more time organizing new vocabulary than actually memorizing English words? We want to help you save time. Now, you no longer need to manually write down each word - simply scan to generate your personalized vocabulary list for quicker and more efficient studying! This can be applied to all levels of English study - elementary, middle school, high school, SAT, TOEIC, TOEFL, TEPS, Public Service English, transfer exam English, IELTS, GRE, G-TELP, Cambridge English, PTE Academic, OET, etc.


✓ Scan a document and it instantly turns into a vocabulary list.
• Forget about the manual process of creating a vocabulary list; just snap a photo and it's transformed into your own personalized list.


✓ You can instantly check unfamiliar words.
• No need to separately organize unfamiliar word list; just by capturing a document, it will automatically classify words you might not know.
• You can set a word extraction filter so that easy words aren't extracted.
• Through word learning, mastered and unfamiliar words are automatically categorized and when scanning documents subsequently, you can instantly check only unfamiliar words.


✓ It automatically organizes idiomatic expressions.
• You might have experienced not being able to interpret despite knowing all the words clearly.
• This is due to idiomatic expressions, where meanings change when several words are combined, and the issue is not knowing which words are idioms.
• Vocabulary Scanner finds such idioms and automatically organizes them for you.


✓ You can quickly search with just part of the word spelling.
• Have you had trouble finding a word because you couldn't remember its spelling?
• Try quickly searching for words by entering only part of the spelling.
• It shows a list of related words every time you enter a spelling.


✓ Learn words through images.
• The left hemisphere of our brain primarily handles language processing, while the right mainly deals with image processing.
• If you simply memorize English words, only the left brain is used, which makes you forget the memorized words quickly.
• Custom images allow you to effectively memorize words, which can also aid long-term memory.


✓ Learn words by solving quizzes.
• We supports four types of learning methods: multiple-choice, flashcards, word lists, and spelling quiz.
• You can check your progress in the middle of a quiz and repeatedly learn words that are difficult to memorize.
• Once a quiz is complete, we gather all the words you answered incorrectly for you to review and study again.


✓ Listen to your own vocabulary list.
• You can listen to your own vocabulary list in the form of a media player.
• Just try to utilize it for 10 minutes while commuting to school or work!


✓ We support AI (Artificial intelligence) voices from over 50 countries worldwide.

title: InnoCaption Live Call Captions
description:
Make Every Call Clear and Accessible with InnoCaption!

Struggling to hear phone calls due to hearing loss? Never miss a word with InnoCaption’s call captioning service to live transcribe your call. Whether you prefer AI captions or captions from live stenographers (CART), ensure fast, accurate captions for all your phone conversations.

InnoCaption is a free, federally funded service designed for individuals who are deaf, hard of hearing, or have difficulty hearing phone calls. Stream phone calls directly to your Bluetooth compatible hearing aids or cochlear implants and get real-time, live transcriptions. InnoCaption works seamlessly with devices like Signia, Phonak, Beltone, ReSound, MED-EL, Oticon, and more*. Missed an important call? Read voicemail transcripts with InnoCaption’s visual voicemail. 

InnoCaption’s call captioning and text to speech technology makes phone calls accessible without needing ASL, offering an alternative to VRS for those who prefer captions. Our caption call app is perfect for seniors, veterans, hearing aid or cochlear implant users, or anyone experiencing hearing loss. Make and receive calls with clear captions using IP relay and teletype technology (TTY) on your phone, tablet, and computer!
Download InnoCaption today—the top solution for captioned calls!

INNOCAPTION FEATURES

Live Transcribe Phone Calls for Individuals With Hearing Loss
• Get clear captions and live transcribe your phone conversations 
• Closed captioning modes: Live stenographer or AI auto captions with teletype technology (TTY)
• Caption call service is available in Spanish, French, Chinese, Vietnamese, and more
• Caption calls on a computer with InnoCaption Web.

Make & Receive Phone Calls With Visual Voicemail and Auto Captions
• FCC certified and funded -  InnoCaption is a FREE caption app for the deaf or individuals with hearing loss
• Setup call forwarding to make and receive calls using your own number
• Stream calls to your Bluetooth compatible hearing aid, cochlear implant, or other assistive listening device
• Sync contacts for convenient dialing & accessibility

Enhanced Accessibility Through Personalization
• Caption Alerts – Receive caption screen alerts when calls resume during long holds.
• Personalize your InnoCaption app - Customize the app to fit your accessibility needs

Hearing aid & cochlear implant compatibility with manufacturers such as:
• Oticon
• Phonak
• Starkey
• MED-EL
• Advanced Bionics
• Cochlear
• Resound
• Unitron
• Signia
• Widex
• Rexton
• and more!*

Voicemail & Transcripts
• Save caption call transcripts to review later
• Visual voicemail converts voicemail to text for convenient review and clear captions to reference

Spam Filter for Secure Calling
• Block high-risk calls and get alerts for potential spam calls

911 Calls
• Caption your emergency calls by dialing 911 from the app**

*Due to potential variations in hardware and software compatibility may vary by individual device.

**911 service may be limited or unavailable in the event of network disruptions or degradation, service connection or internet failure, or other circumstances. For more information visit: https://www.innocaption.com/calling-911

Cellular data plan or Wi-Fi connectivity is required for usage.

FEDERAL LAW PROHIBITS ANYONE BUT REGISTERED USERS WITH HEARING LOSS FROM USING INTERNET PROTOCOL (IP) CAPTIONED TELEPHONES WITH THE CAPTIONS TURNED ON. IP Captioned Telephone Service may use a live operator. The operator generates captions of what the other party to the call says. These captions are then sent to your phone. There is a cost for each minute of captions generated, paid from a federally administered fund.
short_description: Caption & live transcribe calls | Deaf, hard of hearing & tinnitus accessibility

title: Quadropoly - Monopolist Tycoon
description:
Welcome to Quadropoly 3D, the unique and improved variant of the Classic Quadropoly - a property card trading board game that has captured the hearts and mind of millions of families across the World. Quadropoly offers a unique twist on the classic business board game:  an ability to hone your financial management and negotiation skills and learn business strategies from the most patient and experienced teacher of all – an Artificial Intelligence. AI has been trained with Machine Learning models on all games played by millions of players since 2016.  This innovative technology ensures that the game is challenging and engaging for players of all skill levels.

Modern graphics and simple user interface designed to provide players with a great way to spend quality time with family and friends, either offline or online in multiplayer mode. It will improve your financial confidence and business management skills by competing with other players and becoming a monopolist of the board. Quadropoly is not just a game, it is a strategic simulation exercise that can help players of all ages and social classes improve their investment and negotiation skills.

🔵 One of the main foundations of Quadropoly is its commitment to fair play. There is no cheating or re-rolling, and no hidden luck parameters. Instead, players rely on their business and negotiation skills to succeed. AI does not know whether their trading partner is another AI or a human, nor their intelligence regardless of the difficulty: trade offer evaluations depend on pretty much everything on the board, but not on who their opponent is.

📇 Quadropoly provides support for all official rules by the book. With AI advice available at any moment during gameplay, players can rapidly improve their own skills in any business online trading game. Anyone can learn the real value of properties, improve their negotiation skills, and manage their cashflow more effectively.

🎥 One of the most exciting features of Quadropoly is the ability to watch replays of completed games played by the best players from the Leaderboards. This is a great way to learn new tactics and become a better player. With extensive customization options, including support for hundreds of house rules, Quadropoly is a game you can play over and over for years.

🌠 The game's variants in animation speed make it possible to finish within 6-15 minutes, establishing it as a perfect pick for those desiring a fast-paced and thrilling experience. Every single AI in the game is unique, with its personality defining its risk-taking tendencies as well as its attitude towards property. The AIs are great at imitating real people, with the ability to become annoyed, desperate, or greedy.

🎭 With eight difficulty levels available, players can stop on a level they feel comfortable with and advance at their own pace. The number of scores given per game depends on the number of tactics used. This ensures the best players' ability to get a higher score per game, being able to advance 10 to 50 times faster than the beginner and unlock top levels quickly. With top AI levels capable of participating in World Championships, even the best players are guaranteed to find the game very challenging yet fair.
First 2 AI levels do not use Machine Learning models - they are very easy opponents. You can play offline.
The next 2 AI levels do not trade between each other - they are only permitted to trade with the player. 
The remaining 4 AI levels are allowed to use more tactics and have fewer penalties. Last 2 AI, Champions and Monopolists, attempt to trade with everyone every turn!

Quadropoly is not just a board game, it is a true experience. With its innovative features, exciting gameplay and commitment to fair play, it is a game that you will not want to put down. So come and join the fun, crush your opponents and experience the thrill of dominating the competition and becoming the ultimate monopolist in the world of Quadropoly!
short_description: 3D Classic board game online & offline. Learn Business and become a Monopolist!

Please email clevermindgames@gmail.com with any issues, suggestions and questions. Have a great day!

title: Evie - The eVoice book reader
description: GIVE YOUR EYES A MUCH NEEDED REST Evie uses Text To Speech (TTS) technologies to transform written text into an audible narration. Evie is free. Really free, without any ads. You can use for as long as you want, with any Text To Speech engine you have on your phone. ENJOY THOSE BOOKS FOR WHICH YOU NEVER HAD TIME • Listen to a book while commuting • Listen to a book during your work-out • When working in your garden • Or go to sleep listening to a book AUDIO PLAYER FEATURES • Evie can read out loud even in background or with the screen turned off. • You can control playback with your earphones buttons, either Bluetooth or wired. • Evie integrates with your car stereo via Bluetooth. Play, Pause and Skip Forward or Backward from your car's buttons. • You can control it from your lock screen or from the notifications drawer. • Evie offers an Equaliser to fine tune the sound the way you like it. EVIE ON YOUR SMART WATCH Starting with version 16, Evie works on your Wear OS smart watch. This is feature requires an Internet connection and an Evie account. DISCOVER AN APP YOU CAN TRUST Evie does not require any permissions to run. It does not need access to your files, your contacts, or any other information and it does not read nor store cookies on your phone. TRY THE LIFE-LIKE AMAZON VOICES Evie integrates with Polly, the excellent TTS engine from Amazon. Polly is a cloud service that uses deep learning technologies to synthesize speech that sounds like a human voice. This is a paid feature, and requires an Evie account. Evie offers simple in-app purchases in a pay-as-you-go model. LEARN A FOREIGN LANGUAGE WITH EVIE Have Evie repeat each sentence multiple times, then optionally wait for you to repeat. The key to speaking the language is memorization through repetition. READ A BOOK IN A LANGUAGE YOU DON'T KNOW Evie can translate each sentence on the fly, then read the translation out loud to you. Evie uses the excellent Amazon Neural translation engine, supporting more than 70 languages. This is a paid feature, and requires an Evie account. Evie offers simple in-app purchases for in a pay-as-you-go model. You can use for free, with any TTS engine installed on your phone, if you don't want to use the Amazon voices. SUPPORTED FILE TYPES • ePub electronic books (DRM free) • PDF documents (without encryption) • MOBI, AZW and AZW3 books (DRM free) • FB2 and Compressed FB2 • Microsoft DOCX documents • Rich Text (RTF) documents • HTML pages • TEXT documents MORE APPLICATION FEATURES Evie offers an advanced text re-flow option allowing you to comfortably read PDF files on small screen device. Evie can open files from your phone or directly from the Internet and has easy to use and robust library management features. Evie offers the easiest management of Text To Speech voices. Evie remembers your TTS Engine and Voice preferences per language and switches voices automatically to match the book's language. Evie allows you to customize speech speed and the length of pause at punctuation marks in sentence and at the end of sentences, so you can perfectly adapt the speech to your style. Evie has a very easy to use sleep timer feature. Activate it with a single swipe and then Evie will stop reading after the selected time. After the timer ran out, you can always re-start it with a simple press of your earphones button. Evie calculates the remaining listening time with high precision for the current chapter and for the entire book. Download Evie now and enjoy a good book.
short_description: Evie is a revolutionary eBooks reader that narrates your books out loud.
recent_changes_text:

- Added support for devices powered by Intel processors
- Bug fixes an improvements

title: MyLP Driver
description:
MyLP App empowers fleet drivers like you to efficiently manage your company vehicle right from your mobile device. Plus, it’s designed to alert you of what you need to do when.

You get in-app maintenance reminders to keep your vehicle running smoothly. Access the locator to find network service centers near you. Simply present your approved services and authorization codes for easy transactions at the shop. Need to find the nearest, most cost-effective fueling station? The locator tool has you covered. And, when it’s time for a new vehicle, MyLP App will track your order every step of the way.

The redesigned mileage reporting tool makes it easier than ever to log your personal and business miles. The more intuitive user interface means easier scrolling and quicker access to your data. You’ll also get improved status views with new icons and labels for guidance-at-a-glance. Plus, in-app alerts and messages to keep you accurate and up to date. Need to set your preference for monthly or daily reporting? It’s a quick toggle. And, how about some of our most common interactions? Just swipe.

A Digital Glovebox stores your fuel card PIN, registration and insurance information for ready access and fast registration renewals. We can even help you assess and improve your performance as a fleet driver with our in-app OneScore ratings. Need policy support? Just ask your virtual assistant, Elle.

Save time. Stay informed. And upgrade your driving experience. Download the new MyLP App now.

title: Yatzy - Classic Fun Dice Game
description:
Play for free to the most famous and exciting dice game. Yatzy is popular across countries under different names such as Yams, Crag, Farkle, Balut, Yahtzee, Kismet, Generala, Cheerio, Yazy, Yatzi, Yatze, Yatzee...

Each turn, player's roll 5 dice up to 3 times trying to achieve 1 of the 13 combinations. Each combination must be played and scored only once. The goal is to get the highest score possible.

Yatzy comes with 4 modes :
Solo : practice and train yourself on 1 grid and try to beat your personal best
Double grid: play solo on 2 grids and reach the highest score
Versus opponent: challenge yourself and try to beat our bot, a friendly and smart AI
Local player: play with a friend on the same device turn by turn

Yatzy is designed to provide you with the best gaming experience with great graphics. Create your own and unique game with many customization options.

Download it now and play for free wherever and whenever you want! The app is free to use. We offer in-app purchases but you will always be able to use the app for free.

SPECIAL FEATURES

• 4 MODES: solo, double grid, vs opponent, vs local player
• FREE: Play all your games for free anytime
• GREAT INTERFACE: Efficient, fast, intuitive, beautiful and dynamic interface optimized for various screen sizes
• SMART OPPONENT: Opponent simulated by a challenging but still friendly artificial intelligence, that will automatically select the best mode
• AUTO-COUNT: at each roll, you get a clear view of your best scoring options
• CUSTOMIZATION: choose your backgrounds, dices skins, sounds effects and music tracks
• GAME AUTOSAVE: Freely stop the game at anytime and continue later
• STATISTICS: Track your performance with the statistics from your matches
• SPECIAL HINTS: hints on the best moves, extra roll, undo and many other hints
• BONUS: Earn free gems everyday
• FLIGHT MODE / OFFLINE: works also without any internet connection

We believe that quality and simplicity improve the gaming experience, and that's why we created it for you!

Playing Yatzy is not only exciting, it trains your brain and improves your strategic skills. It is also a very good way to take a break and relax. Join our Yatzy experience to relax and stay sharp with a very complete, easy and smooth app!

If you like board games or puzzle games, Yatzy is made for you!

Are you ready to win the next game? Install the app and enjoy!

We regularly update the app so it is always better for you. Download the latest version to get all the available features. This version includes several bug fixes and performance improvements.

https://www.zengardenapps.com/
short_description: Relax and fun for hours playing the original Yatzy dice game online or offline.

title: Invoxia GPS
description:
Never worry about your valuables again! Track your Motorcycle, Car, Bike, Bags, Loved Ones, Pets, and more with Invoxia GPS Trackers. 24/7 Monitoring, real time anti-theft alerts, geofencing, activity monitoring and unlimited location history.

Get an Invoxia GPS Tracker, Bike Tracker, Pet Tracker or Mini Tracker now to put your mind at ease and protect what you care about! 
The Invoxia GPS App works with all Invoxia GPS Trackers. 

You can get an Invoxia GPS Tracker at our web shop: www.invoxia.com

This app enables you to: 

*Track your vehicle, assets, loved ones, pets and more
*Receive theft alerts when your vehicle or assets are tilted or moved
*See your tracker’s complete location history 
*Set virtual geofences and configure entry/exit notifications
*Make your tracker ring to find it more easily
*Check your tracker’s battery level
*Adjust your tracker’s update frequency
*Monitor an unlimited number of Invoxia GPS Trackers
*Use the proximity radar for short-range location
*See an overview of your pet’s daily activity

***24/7 Tracking *** 
Keep a watchful eye on your car, motorcycle, or anything else you want to track. Know where your Invoxia GPS Tracker is from the app at any time. 

***Tilt and Motion alerts***
Instantly receive a notification when your motorcycle or other valuables equipped with an Invoxia GPS Tracker are tilted more than 30 degrees or if motion is detected.

***Interactive Map***
The interactive maps allow you to display the location of all your vehicles or valuables with trackers. You can zoom into the location of an individual tracker. With the Invoxia GPS app you can add an unlimited number of trackers. You can also switch between the standard map view and hybrid satellite view. 

***Regular updates***
While your tracker is in motion, receive regular updates of its position. Choose between three update frequencies (High, Medium, Low). Always know where your tracker is.

***Location History***
Consult your tracker’s location history for any time period you choose. See where your tracker has been and how quickly it got from point A to B.

***Geofencing (Safe Zones)*** 
Define geographic zones in the app for your important places: your home, the office, your children’s school, or anywhere else! Receive notifications when your Tracker enters or leaves these areas, so you’re always in the know. 

***Important Notifications*** 
Receive notifications via the app the second your vehicle begins to move, or your assets are being tampered with. 

***Pet Activity***
See a breakdown of your pet’s daily activity and better understand how they spend their time.

***Battery Status***
Always keep an eye on the battery status of your Invoxia GPS Tracker. The app displays how much battery is remaining and sends out reminder notifications if the battery runs low. 

***SOS Alerts***
Receive an instant alert and position update if the button on your Invoxia GPS Tracker is pressed. 

***Update your tracker***
Our team of engineers is constantly improving the functionality of our GPS Trackers. With the app, receive a notification and update the firmware of your tracker to enjoy the latest features. 

***Proximity Radar***
Are you near your tracker but can’t find it? The app includes a proximity radar that uses Bluetooth technology to help you navigate the last few feet. 

***IFTTT Compatible***
All Invoxia GPS Trackers are compatible with the IFTTT platform enabling you to design more complex automations and connect all of your connected devices together. With IFTTT, enable SMS and email notifications. 

No limit to the number of users using the same account: you can have multiple people monitoring your trackers

Notifications are sent through the app.

About Invoxia: 
Founded in 2010, lnvoxia designs and manufactures a range of sensors that integrate artificial intelligence. Invoxia offers a range of intelligent GPS trackers for vehicles (cars, motorcycles, trucks), pets and bicycles with ultra-long battery life.
short_description: Companion app for all Invoxia GPS Trackers. Track anything, anywhere.

title: WeWALK
description:
WeWALK is an innovative mobility platform developed by blind people for visually impaired and low-vision individuals. With the WeWALK Smart Cane and WeWALK App, you can confidently navigate your surroundings, discover nearby locations, and access a range of accessible services—all designed to enhance your independence. 

Key Features: 

Step-by-Step Navigation 

WeWALK offers accessible, step-by-step navigation, allowing visually impaired and low-vision users to easily find their way to any destination. You can explore different routes, choose your preferred path, and receive real-time instructions. 

Public Transportation Integration 

View nearby public transport stops, learn about the upcoming lines, and get notified when approaching your stop—ensuring you never miss your destination. 

Smart Cane Integration 

When paired with the WeWALK Smart Cane, the app takes navigation to the next level. The Smart Cane features enhanced obstacle detection (including head-height obstacles) and provides vibration feedback to ensure a safer, more confident journey. 

With built-in AI voice assistance, you can control the app features directly from the cane without needing your phone. 

Intelligent Voice Assistant 

Interact with your cane using your voice. The Intelligent Voice Assistant allows users to get information, navigation instructions, and other details simply by talking to their Smart Cane 2. 

Explore Mode 

Activate the Explore mode to discover nearby places while walking. WeWALK will announce important locations such as restaurants, cafes, shops, and more as you pass by. Visually impaired users can enjoy exploring their surroundings without missing any important landmarks. 

Accessible Route Information 

Receive information about intersections, stairs, elevators, and more while navigating, allowing you to plan your journey with ease. The app is fully optimized for screen readers and designed to provide an unobstructed navigation experience. 

How It Works: 

To start using WeWALK, simply search for your destination via the app and receive step-by-step guidance. You can also use the Explore feature to list nearby locations and navigate directly or save them for later. 

With the public transport feature, visually impaired users can view the next bus or train lines, track their journey, and receive alerts when approaching their stop. 

If you're using the WeWALK Smart Cane 2, pair it with the app to unlock seamless control and navigation 

WeWALK's Commitment to Accessibility: 

WeWALK is continuously evolving, thanks to collaborations with visually impaired individuals, organizations, and partners like Microsoft and Imperial College London. We are committed to making the world more accessible through innovative technology and community-driven development. 

Important Information: 

WeWALK is an application that you can use with voice commands in accordance with the accessibility standards, suitable for the use of the visually impaired. Accessibility services permission is required to use this feature.

The WeWALK App requires access to your location in the background to provide core features like nearby place notifications and turn-by-turn navigation when your phone is locked. 

Subscription and Renewal: 

Enjoy WeWALK free for 14 days when you subscribe. After the trial period, payment will be charged to your App Store account. Your subscription automatically renews unless auto-renew is turned off at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. 

Manage your subscription or turn off auto-renew in your Account settings anytime after purchase. 

Terms of Use: https://wewalk.io/en/terms-and-conditions/ 

Privacy Policy: https://wewalk.io/en/privacy-policy/ 

  
For any inquiries, contact us at info@wewalk.io
short_description: WeWALK: Your Smart Mobility Companion for Accessible Navigation
recent_changes_text: Previously, we did not provide warnings when you walked in the opposite direction during navigation. In this version, if you exceed 20 meters (66 feet) in the wrong direction, you will hear a warning. After hearing this warning, the navigation direction will be updated. For example, when you miss a turn to the left, you will hear the return warning and the direction will be updated as turn right.
