title: MacroDroid - Device Automation
description:
MacroDroid is the easiest way to automate tasks on your Android smartphone or tablet. Via the straightforward user interface MacroDroid makes it possible to build fully automated tasks in just a few taps.

A few examples of how MacroDroid can help you to get automated:

# Manage files on your device, for example automating file copying, moving and deleting to keep your file system clean.
# Auto reject incoming calls when in a meeting (as set in your calendar).
# Increase safety while commuting by reading your incoming notifications and messages (via Text to Speech) and send automated responses via email or SMS.
# Optimize your daily workflow on your phone; switch on bluetooth and start playing music when you enter your car. Or switch on WiFi when near your house.
# Reduce battery drain (e.g. dim screen and switch Wifi off)
# Make custom sound and notification profiles. 
# Remind you to do certain tasks using timers and stopwatches.

These are just a few examples out of limitless scenarios where MacroDroid can make your Android life a little easier. With only 3 simple steps this is how it works:

1. Select a Trigger.

The trigger is the cue for the macro to start. MacroDroid offers over 80 triggers to start your macro, i.e. location based triggers (like GPS, cell towers, etc), device status triggers (like battery level, app starting/closing), sensor triggers (like shaking, light levels, etc) and connectivity triggers (like Bluetooth, Wifi and Notifications).
You can also create a shortcut on the homescreen of your device or run using the unique and customizable Macrodroid sidebar.

2. Select the Actions you like to automate.

MacroDroid can perform over 100 different actions, that you typically would do by hand. Connect to your Bluetooth or Wifi device, select volume levels, speak text (like your incoming notifications or current time), start a timer, dim your screen, run Tasker plugin and many more.

3. Optionally: Configure Constraints.

Constraints help you to let the macro fire only when you want it to. 
Living near your work, but only want to connect to your company's Wifi during work days? With a constraint you can select specific times or days that the macro can be invoked. MacroDroid offers over 50 constraint types.

MacroDroid is compatible with Tasker and Locale plugins to expand the range of possibilities even further.

= For beginners =

MacroDroid's unique interface offers a Wizard that guides step by step through the configuration of your first macros. 
It is also possible to use an existing template from the template section and customize it to your needs.
The built-in forum allows you to get help from other users, allowing you to easy learn the ins and outs of MacroDroid.

= For more experienced users =

MacroDroid offers more comprehensive solutions like the use of Tasker and Locale plugins, system/user defined variables, scripts, intents, advance logic like IF, THEN, ELSE clauses, use of AND/OR

The free version of MacroDroid is ad-supported and allows up to 5 macros. The Pro version (a small one time fee) removes all adverts and allows an unlimited amount of macros.

= Support =

Please use the in-app forum for all usage questions and feature requests, or access via www.macrodroidforum.com.

To report bugs please use the built in 'Report a bug' option available via the troubleshooting section.

= Accessibility Services =

MacroDroid makes use of accessibility services for certain features like automating UI Interactions. use of accessibility services is entirely at the users discretion. No user data is ever obtained or logged from any accessibility service.

= Wear OS =

This app contains a Wear OS companion app for interaction with MacroDroid. This is not a standalone app and requires the phone application installed. The Wear OS app supports complications populated by MacroDroid to use along with your watch face of choice.
short_description: Number one automation app for Android - Over 20 million Downloads.

title: Regroup Poker Tools & Charts
description:
The best free app for tracking income, managing your bankroll, and mastering strategy. Whether you're logging wins, navigating GTO preflop charts, or calculating equity, Regroup offers everything you need to dominate the table. Download now and transform your poker performance!

* Keep Track of Your Poker Income
The best way to become a better player is to know how you're doing. Regroup is the fastest way to track your wins and losses, notes of the important details of your session, and track your poker income & bankroll. You can record unlimited sessions, always free. 

* GTO Preflop Range Charts
Crush the next tournament by using these fast and easy range charts. Click through preflop charts for a variety of stack sizes, and easily navigate between different player actions to see the right move. 

* Equity Calculator
We've built the fastest and easiest to use modern equity calculator. Plug in your hand, the board, and we'll give you the odds! See graphs to see how often you smash the flop or turn card. Supports Texas Holdem, Omaha, Big O, Lazy Pineapple, and Double Board games. 

* Poker Vlog Mode
Want to turn your hands into a video? Use the Equity Calculator's Vlog mode to get green screen graphics you can use in your favorite video editor. 

* Hand History Logger
Keep notes on important hands in a heartbeat. Then, share with your friends.

* Automatic Cloud Backups
Don't worry about losing your phone and your data. Your data is safely synced in the cloud. 

* Free Import / Export
Move your data easily between Regroup and other apps. Your data belongs to you, don't pay to get it back! We support importing from Poker Income, Poker Analytics, Poker Bankroll Tracker, RunGood, and your own spreadsheets. We're also happy to help you import your data!

* Home Game Organizing Tool
Organize games with friends? Keep track of everyone's buy-ins and see how much money is on the table. Then, easily calculate who pays who. Supports calculating payouts from Pokerrr 2 and PokerNow CSVs as well. 

* Get Advice from a Poker Chatbot
Need to rant to a friend or get poker advice? We've tailored a chatbot for poker help!

Feedback? We're active on Twitter @getregroup and Instagram @regroupapp!

Mira gets smarter every day. Track your cycles to reach your fertility goals, learn more about your reproductive health, and make informed and confident life decisions. 

The Mira app is free, with no ads, and no in-app purchases!

Why track your cycles with Mira? Because our algorithms are trained on real hormonal values—Mira has analyzed over 370k menstrual cycles and 4M+ hormone data points. Mira is more than just a cycle-tracking app—it learns from your data and gets smarter every day.  

Take your cycle tracking to the next level by tracking MORE data like hormone values, cycle stages, mood, basal body temperature, cervical mucus, medication, and more. 

Mira was designed to be part of your team. Understand more about what’s going on in your body and how you feel. Calculate your period & ovulation with Mira’s state-of-the-art technology, co-developed by renowned OBGYNs. 

Get FREE access to our expert library of articles, webinars, and free EBooks regarding your fertility and hormones. 

Use Partners Mode if you’re trying to conceive or tracking your cycles with a partner. Access your partner’s cycle data to check fertile days, PMS, or other cycle phases. 

Access multiple views within the app. See your calendar, hormone charts, scores, daily status, and receive personalized tips. 

To gain even more powerful insight, purchase the revolutionary Mira Hormone Tracker for an in-depth look into your cycle. Pinpoint your ovulation day, 6-day fertile window, confirm your ovulation, and say goodbye to guesswork for good. Purchasing the Mira Hormone Tracker IS NOT necessary to use the app.

title: Unstuck: CBT Therapy Journal
description:
Take charge of your mental health. Overcome anxiety and depression with CBT journaling. 81% of people with moderate to severe anxiety see an improvement after just one month of using Unstuck.

By processing your thoughts and experiences with a guided CBT journal, you’ll develop the skills to take control of your mental health. Unstuck is based on cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT), the gold standard treatment in psychotherapy. The techniques we use are backed by science, so expect results.

CBT is effective, not just for anxiety and depression, but also for stress, anger, trauma (PTSD), OCD, ADHD, and BPD.

JOURNALING

Unstuck includes multiple journal and diary types that work in unison to improve mental health.

Thought Journal: Understand and train your brain to overcome unhelpful thinking patterns. 80% of people with distress see an instant improvement after completing an entry.

Savoring Journal: Find joy and gratitude in daily life. 74% of people with anxiety see an immediate positive impact after completing an entry.

Exposure Journal: Fight your fears by facing them with exposure therapy. This extremely powerful method for overcoming anxiety is out now. Unstuck utilizes inhibitory retrieval, the most effective exposure therapy approach based on the latest research (Craske et al., 2022).

DISCOVER INSIGHTS

Unstuck will deliver personalized insights so you can understand how your thought patterns change over time. Discover which thinking traps you’ve overcome and which you’re still falling into. See how events in your life are tied to changing levels of anxiety and depression. Draw meaningful connections to accelerate your mental health improvement.

AI SECOND OPINION

Not just a chatbot that spoon-feeds responses, your AI partner will strengthen your Thought Journal by conducting an objective analysis, uncovering thinking traps, and offering a fresh perspective.

AI FEAR FINDER

Get AI assistance with exposure therapy. AI Fear Finder helps identify your underlying fears, so they can be effectively targeted with the Exposure Journal.

DARK MODE

Whether you love the soothing vibe of dark hues or want to ease the strain on your eyes during late-night journaling, Unstuck has you covered. Choose from Dark Mode, Light Mode, or sync with your device settings for a seamless experience.

ACCESS ON ALL YOUR DEVICES

Get the support you need on the go with our mobile app. Or, if you prefer typing on a keyboard, use our website to access Unstuck from your desktop computer.

KEEP YOUR DATA SAFE

Create an optional account and Unstuck will automatically keep your data backed up and synced. Or, create local backups with the data export feature.

TRY FOR FREE

Try Unstuck with a free trial. After that, we offer monthly and yearly subscriptions.

If you are facing financial hardship, apply for a free plan in the app. We believe Unstuck should be accessible to everyone and do not want to turn anyone away for lack of funds.

We always love hearing your feedback — send it to us in the app or by emailing us at feedback@becomeunstuck.app.
short_description: Overcome anxiety and depression with science-backed CBT and AI analysis.
recent_changes_text: Updated fonts on progress page.

title: PLC Ladder Simulator 2
description:
In industry, the PLC is the most important automation device because of its role as the brain in running industrial processes.  This brain uses syntax to be able to perform tasks in an orderly, sequential manner.

The native language of the PLC is called “ladder logic”.  Ladder logic is graphical, in that it can be laid out in a form that resembles a ladder with rails and rungs.  Ladder logic diagrams were developed originally from relay-circuit diagrams that were used for electronic circuitry prior to the advent of PLCs.

PLC Ladder Simulator 2 is a simulator for the Android operating system with input and output objects that simulate the I/O ports of a real PLC.  You can use PLC Ladder Simulator to create ladder-logic diagrams using components from the standard set used in these diagrams.

PLC Ladder Simulator 2 is the successor of PLC Ladder Simulator, this version comes with big changes like a better and more friendly user interface UI and user experience UX, better use of sub-rungs, more functions blocks, unlimited save files and the possibility to export them to other devices that run the app, and much more.

PLC Ladder Simulator 2 allows to auto-generate Arduino code for some Arduino boards from your ladder designs.

IMPORTANT: Don't forget to check the help tutorial inside the app to understand how to use it.

PLC Ladder Simulator 2 Website: http://plcladdersimulator2.weebly.com/

If you have any question or problem, you can contact me at casdata@gmail.com
short_description: Ladder logic language simulator and code generator for Arduino boards.

title: JyotishApp - Astrology Jyotish

NO PREDICTION: This App does not give any prediction.
The App supports voice commands. Generate horoscope using voice commands ( speech recognition ) without manually entering birth details.

The main features of JyotishApp are:
==============================
-- Generate detailed Horoscope or Kundli in South-Indian, North-Indian or East-Indian style.
-- Option to save complete Horoscope as PDF. Option to share Horoscope PDF using Gmail, WhatsApp, etc, directly from App.
-- Shodasha Varga (all 20 Varga) charts like Rashi, Navamsha, Hora, Drekkana, Chaturthamsha, Saptamsha, Dashamsha, Dwadashamsha, Shodashamsha, Vimshamsha, Chaturvimshamsha, Saptavimshamsha, Trimshamsha, Khavedamsha, Akshavedamsha, and Shashtyamsha.
-- Different Dasha systems like Vimshottari, Ashtottari, Yogini, Tribhagi and Chara Dasha. Dasha details up to Prana-antara Dasha.
-- Yogas, Shadbala, Bhava Bala and Vimsopaka Bala with graphical representation.
-- Ashtakavarga, Sarvashtakavarga and Bhinna Ashtakavarga of all Vargas. Trikona Shodhana, Ekadhipatya Shodhana and Shodhya Pinda.
-- Choose between True Nodes and Mean Nodes.
-- Support for different Bhava (House) systems like Placidus (KP), Equal Houses, Porphyry (Sripathi).
-- Panchang details like Tithi, Weekday, Nakshatra, Yoga, Karana, Hindu Sunrise / Sunset, Ayana, Abhijit Muhurta, Amrit Kalam, etc., for any date and time.
-- Muhurta - Hora, Choghadiya, Chogadiya  and Tamil Gowri Panchangam (Nalla Neram).
-- Gochar or Transit results of all the planets for all Rashi-Nakshatra.
-- Forecast based on Chandra-Bala, Tara-Bala, Guru-Bala and Gochara-Phala according to your Janma Rashi.
-- Horoscope or Kundali matching based on Ashta Kuta. Shows matching points of 8 Kutas, Varna Kuta, Vashya Kuta, Dina or Tara Kuta, Yoni Kuta, Graha Maitri Kuta, Gana Kuta, Rashi Kuta or Bhakuta and Nadi Kuta.
-- Has a Chart Widget which shows the position of planets for the current date, time and default place. This is used to analyze Gochara or Transit results.
-- Panchanga widget shows basic Panchang details along with current Hora.
-- JyotishApp requires permission to run at startup to load the Widget.

title: Ping: AI To‑Do & Reminders
description:
Ping is the fastest way to capture tasks.  
Talk, star an email, or snap a photo – Ping’s AI instantly turns it into a clear to-do with title, due date, reminder and a short action summary. See tasks on your calendar, get smart reminders, and manage work solo or with your team.  

Capture with AI  
• Voice / Dictation → Task: Just speak. Dictate your to-do or use voice input – AI sets the title, date and reminder automatically.  
• Speech-to-text capture: Turn quick voice notes into tasks instantly.  
• Gmail → Task: Star an email and get a task with a clean title and AI summary.  
• Photo / Screenshot → Task: Turn WhatsApp messages, notes and screenshots into actions.  

Plan & execute  
• Calendar sync: Deadlines appear in Google Calendar.  
• Smart reminders & snooze: Nudges that adapt to your day.  
• Tags, checklists & recurring tasks: Stay organized and automate routines.  
• Projects & Kanban boards: Plan work, assign tasks and track progress.  
• Collaboration: Share lists, mention teammates and move faster together.  
• Integrations: ChatGPT and Slack to capture tasks where you talk.  
• Cross-platform: iOS, Android, Mac and Windows.  

Who it’s for  
Ping works in Simple mode (personal to-do list) and Advanced mode (projects, boards, collaboration). Perfect for quick capture and powerful enough for small teams.
short_description: AI task list. Create tasks from voice, emails & screenshots. Sync with Calendar.
recent_changes_text: Bug fixes and improvements

title: GitMind: AI Mind Mapping App
description:
GitMind is an AI-powered mind mapping tool built on cutting-edge AI models like GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek R1, and more. It seamlessly transforms text, videos, articles, audio, PDFs, PPTs, websites, and images into concise summaries and intuitive mind maps. Featuring an AI chatbot, copilot, advanced search features, and realistic AI image generator, GitMind simplifies complex information and empowers you to work smarter and faster.

GitMind is ideal for note-taking, schedule planning, brainstorming, decision-making, and project management. Easily create outlines, to-do lists, and project plans while syncing your ideas seamlessly across devices. Whether you are an educator, student, or professional, GitMind turns every piece of content into a dynamic visual map, sparking creativity and boosting productivity anytime, anywhere.

💡 AI Features
• Youtube Video Summarizer: Extract subtitles, distinguish speakers, and summarize videos into mind maps with key insights.
• Text Summarizer: Simplify lengthy text into clear, structured summaries for quick understanding.
• Article Summarizer: Summarize articles and blogs into well-organized mind maps.
• PDF Summarizer: Extract essential points from PDFs and transform them into structured visual maps.
• Audio Summarizer: Transcribe audio to text and summarize recordings into easy-to-read notes and mind maps.
• Image Summarizer: Use OCR to extract text from images and summarize key information into structured content.
• Website Summarizer: Summarize entire web pages into organized mind maps for quick insights.
• Prompt to Mind Map: Enter any idea or topic, and GitMind will instantly generate a detailed outline and mind map.
• AI Chatbot: Upload PDFs or images to ask questions directly.
• AI Search: Find the most relevant and up-to-date information with AI-powered smart search.
• AI Image Generator: Generate high-quality AI images from text to visually enhance your mind maps and presentations.

Other Features
• Presentation Mode: Seamlessly present your mind maps with a structured, engaging slideshow, perfect for meetings, lectures, and brainstorming sessions.
• Premade Templates & Themes: Access a variety of professionally designed templates and themes to quickly create visually appealing mind maps.
• Advanced Formatting Options: Customize fonts, colors, sizes, and backgrounds to tailor your mind maps to your style and needs.
• Insert Stickers & Illustrations: Enrich your mind maps with icons, stickers, and illustrations to enhance visualization and creativity.
• Find & Locate Text: Quickly search and locate specific words or phrases within your mind maps for easy editing and navigation.
• Share & Collaborate: Share your mind maps via links, invite teammates for real-time collaboration, and work seamlessly across multiple devices.

🚀 Use Cases
• AI-Powered Summary
Summarize articles, videos, websites, PDFs, and audio into structured mind maps, outlines, and key takeaways. Use AI Chat to refine ideas and boost comprehension.
• Brainstorming & Idea Generation
Convert fleeting thoughts into structured mind maps, notes, concept maps, whiteboards, and slides. Use AI-generated mind maps for fresh ideas, and chat with AI to refine concepts.
• Project & Business Planning
Visualize tasks, streamline workflows, and break down projects into clear, actionable steps. Use tree charts, fishbone diagrams, and timelines for structured planning.
• Study & Research
Organize notes, create study guides, and boost learning retention with interactive mind maps. Ideal for students, researchers, and educators.

title: Ezlogz: ELD & Truck Navigation
description:
Ezlogz ELD app is designed for truck drivers so they could think less about receipts, paths, inspections, Hours of Service (or just HOS), and concentrate on the road.


What is Ezlogz and how can it help you as a truck load driver? It's a digitized driver’s logbook where you don’t need to spend much time writing something down. The first and one of the most important functions is GPS which will help you to plan your route. All sorts of timers that will keep a driving log and give information to a trucker about every minute HOS, ELD timer. The easiest way to install Electronic Logging Device (ELD, eld device, or E-Log) on the market. Ezlogz ELD app will inform truckers about HOS violations with a smart alert system. Also, you can create a DVIR where you have all the tools to describe what you need and an electronic signature to prove that it’s valid. Points of interest that will help you with your road trip. On detailed maps you will find rest stops, gas stations, hotels, travel centers, truck parking, weigh stations, and even road conditions. The review system will tell you what place is better.


Ezlogz’s mission is to provide the best ELD service with all features that are essential to fleet management:


Electronic Logging Device | EzSmart ELD
* FMCSA certified ELD
* Hours of Service (HOS) violation alerts
* Truck GPS navigation
* Trip planner
* Upgraded IFTA reports
* Electronic DVIR
* Document scan, attach BOL
* No renting fees and no additional payments


AI Chatbot I EzChatAI
* Answer questions about Hours of Service (HOS), drivers' logbook, Electronic Logging Device (ELD), and other questions related to driver's work
* Notify the driver about missing data in their ELD or HOS logbook, driving condition changes, etc.
* Real-time weather, traffic, and route information to help drivers make informed decisions on the road
* Reduce costs by automating and optimizing logistics-related processes
* Improve productivity, efficiency, and safety on the road
* Technical support to drivers
* Emotion recognition and personalized recommendations
* Natural language processing and voice commands
* Analyze drivers' behavior. Export analytics
* Possibility of integrating with CRM systems
* User verification


Dashcam | EzSmartCam
* Real-time GPS tracking
* Fix risky or distracted driving instantly with audio feedback and alerts
* Get the info about the vehicle's location and speed, even without the ELD app connection
* No additional fees for EzCloud - raw data storage for the EzSmart electronic logging device


GPS I Ez-GPS
* Weather-proof and ultra-rugged casing for intensified durability
* Adaptive tracking technology for enhanced fleet management
* Strong battery endurance


Load Board | Ezloadz
* Thousands of load opportunities available 24/7 from the largest freight broker companies
* Dedicated carrier and truck driver support
* Sort by the highest paying jobs, most recent posting, and nearest load
* Book better loads, earn more with Ezloadz


Have any difficulties? Our multi-language support department is ready to help 24/7 with the ELD system for trucks surrounding questions and other issues!


Download our Ezlogz ELD app and enjoy the road with user-friendly GPS without any second thoughts about documents or how to plan your path through the country.

title: MedIQ Smart Healthcare
description:
Going Beyond Physical Hospitals with Digital, Virtual, and Hybrid Care
MedIQ Smart Healthcare is a hybrid healthcare platform that connects digital health services with a nationwide network of hospitals, pharmacies, and laboratories across Pakistan. We enable users to access healthcare through both online services and physical walk in visits, offering flexibility, convenience, and continuity of care.
All medical services are delivered by licensed healthcare professionals and registered partner institutions.
What MedIQ Helps You Do
Medication Fulfillment Support
MedIQ enables users to place requests for prescription-based and over the counter medicines through verified partner pharmacies. Users may choose home delivery or visit partner pharmacies directly. All medications are dispensed by licensed pharmacies in accordance with applicable regulations.
Lab and Diagnostic Service Booking
Users can book laboratory and diagnostic services offered by partner laboratories. Sample collection may be available at home or at physical lab locations, depending on service availability. All testing is performed by certified laboratories and trained professionals.
Corporate and Insurance Utilisation Support
For eligible corporate and insured users, MedIQ supports digital tracking and record keeping of healthcare utilisation and approved benefits. The platform helps organise service usage information and does not make medical or financial approval decisions.
Payment Convenience
MedIQ supports multiple payment options including mobile wallets, debit cards, credit cards, online bank transfers, and cash on delivery. Cashless services may be available for users covered under participating corporate or insurance programs.
Personal Health Records Storage
Users can securely store and access their personal medical documents and records within the application. Records can be shared with healthcare providers at the user’s discretion. MedIQ does not interpret or analyse medical records for clinical purposes.
Informational Health Summaries
The platform may display general, non diagnostic summaries and usage insights related to healthcare services accessed through MedIQ. This information is provided for informational and administrative purposes only.
Customer Support
MedIQ provides customer support to assist users with service coordination, bookings, account related queries, and general platform assistance.
Important Medical Disclaimer
MedIQ Smart Healthcare does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, treatment, or clinical decision-making. The application is intended for healthcare access, coordination, and record management only. All medical services are provided by independent licensed healthcare professionals and registered partner institutions. Users must consult a qualified healthcare professional for any medical concerns, diagnosis, or treatment decisions.
short_description: MedIQ is Pakistan’s first Digitally Integrated Hybrid Healthcare Platform

title: Grammarly-AI Writing Assistant
description: Edit and correct your grammar, spelling, punctuation, and more with your personal writing assistant, grammar checker, and editor. Advanced features such as the AI-powered rewrite tool help you enhance your vocabulary, spell check words, and improve your writing - from emails to social media posts. Grammarly grammar checker and editor - how does it work? Simply download Grammarly and start typing in any app. Grammarly will check each word, your grammar, spelling, punctuation, and tone, and help you improve your communication skills. Whether you’re typing emails on the go, editing an important LinkedIn post, sending a text message, or composing an essential tweet, the Grammarly writing assistant and grammar checker lets you spell check, correct, edit and perfect your message from your mobile device with confidence. Leveraging the power of generative AI, Grammarly allows you to easily rewrite your messages by composing new versions for you to choose from. Simply select the rewrite option that makes your writing more descriptive, confident, formal - and much more! Grammarly works with any Android keyboard, such as Gboard or SwiftKey, so you’ll never have to switch keyboards when you need help writing that important email, text, or social post. Edit, spell check, and correct your writing in real time – Grammar checker: Know your grammar is always mistake-free. – Spelling checker and proofreader: Easily avoid common typos. – Advanced punctuation correction: Take the guesswork out of punctuation. Writing assistant and proofreader: Improve your communication skills – Receive short, clear explanations for every correction. – Understand your mistakes and avoid them in the future. Improve your writing through GenAI - Select your text and click “improve it” to see GenAI-created new versions - Choose versions to shorten, add more description, sound more confident, and more! *** Uplevel Your Communication Skills With Premium *** Take your writing and communication skills from good to great with our advanced features and suggestions. title: Bottled - Message in a Bottle
description:
Make friends, chat, and have fun with penpals from all over the world.
Share what’s on your mind
* Write a message, put it in a bottle & throw it in the sea for someone to find!
* Meeting new friends and finding support has never been so simple

Bottled is building a positive and supportive community, away from the toxicity prevalent in Social Media.

Try the modern version of sending a message in a Bottle - a new way to meet people, have fun, and have meaningful conversations! 

This is how it works:

1) You write a nice message, put it in a bottle, and throw it to the sea. Your bottle will be randomly received by someone, somewhere in the world.
2) If that person decides to keep the bottle, you have a new friend and you can start chatting with each other! 
3) And if your message gets released, your bottle will float back into the sea to be received by another random stranger! 

On Bottled you can: 
- Send a photo, voice, or text message to someone somewhere in the world. 
- Follow the journey of your Bottles in real time

Slowly or instantly, you chat at your own pace and without pressure; improve your wellbeing and mental health on this supportive community. *** If you need assistance, do not hesitate to contact us at contact@bottledapp.com ***

title: Rithmm: AI Sports Betting
description:
Rithmm: The AI Platform for Smarter Sports Betting

Smarter bets. Faster research. Less guesswork. The power of AI meets sports 
betting.

Rithmm is the AI sports betting app built for bettors who want a real edge across player props, game picks, parlays, and DFS lineups — covering NFL, NBA, college football, college basketball, and more.

Designed to support a simple, fast, and repeatable betting process, Rithmm delivers data-backed predictions that adapt to your betting style, so you can bet with information instead of instinct.

—----
NEW: AI PARLAY BUILDER AND BETSLIP
 
Your parlays deserve a second opinion. 

Rithmm’s AI Parlay Builder reviews every pick in your parlay or combo and automatically identifies weak or risky legs before you place the bet.

How it works:

- Parlay Pieces highlights bets Rithmm recommends as part of a parlay 
- Add any number of picks to your parlay or combo
- Rithmm’s AI scans each leg for model strength and recent performance
- If a leg is weak or risky, it’s flagged automatically
- When a stronger alternative exists, Rithmm suggests an AI-approved swap
- Send the optimized parlay to your sportsbook or trading platform with one tap

If you’ve ever searched for a parlay calculator, combo builder, or parlay builder to double-check your picks, this is built for you — with real analysis behind it.


—----
WHY BETTORS CHOOSE RITHMM

> Smart Signals (Exclusive to Rithmm)

Our AI identifies repeatable patterns where models perform best and surfaces them daily — giving you high-confidence picks with proven predictive accuracy.

> AI Picks and Player Prop Predictions

Get instant, AI-powered betting predictions tailored to your strategy. Rithmm’s proprietary models analyze player and team performance, injuries, and conditions to help you make smarter bets — delivering personalized AI picks built around your style.
> The Power of AI Betting Predictions

If you like apps like HOF Bets, Linemate, or Outlier for their stats and trend data, you’ll love Rithmm. We go further — providing AI predictions for every player and every game, plus access to our network of over a million predictive models. Copy top-performing models or let Rithmm’s AI work in the background to surface the best plays through Smart Signals.

> Custom Models, Built Your Way

Use Rithmm’s data-scientist models or create your own. Adjust factors, weight metrics, and design your strategy — your model, your edge.

> Track & Refine Performance
Rithmm doesn’t just predict — it helps you improve. Track your performance, analyze ROI by sport or bet type, and fine-tune your strategy over time.

—----

SPORTS COVERED
NFL • NBA • CFB • CBB • MLB • WNBA • Golf

TRY FREE FOR 7 DAYS
Join thousands using Rithmm’s AI betting predictions to find edges and bet smarter.
Start your free 7-day trial today.

SUBSCRIPTION PLANS
Rithmm is a subscription service offering several monthly and annual plans:
Core: $29.99 / mo or $239.99 / yr
Premium: $99.99 / mo 
Payment auto-renews unless disabled in your Google Play account settings.


RESPONSIBLE GAMING

Rithmm is for entertainment purposes only and does not involve real-money betting or prizes. Must be 21+. If you have a gambling problem, call 1-800-GAMBLER.
Sports betting is regulated and permitted only in select U.S. states. This content is intended solely for individuals of legal betting age (21+). Availability varies by location. No guarantees of outcomes are made. Please check your local laws and gamble responsibly.

TERMS & CONDITIONS

title: AVR Tutorial
description: This app is a AVR tutorial based on ATMEGA16 C language. It is suitable for hobbyist or engineering students. Learning AVR mcu is difficult. The learning curve is steep. The process including reading datasheet, writing code, building prototypes and troubleshooting. The most possible errors are the setting wrong value of registers. Now, AVR tutorial is the solution. The code wizard allow you to set the timer, UART, ADC, interrupt and peripherals by just a few clicks in setting. The proven C source code is generated automatically. Though the code wizard is based on ATMEGA16 , it is easy to port to other ATMEGA since the source code generated is highly structured Features • AVR architecture review • AVR asm mnemonics & C lanugage • 21 demo projects including led, keys, keypad, 16x2 LCM, ADC etc • Code wizard for UART, timer, interrupt, ADC and external peripherals including LED, buzzer, key switch, external interrupt, 7-segment display, 8x8 led matrix, 4x4 keypad, 16x2 LCM, real time clock etc Features Pro • Support I2C eeprom 24C01 (128B) ~ 24C512 (64kB) • Support SPI eeprom 25010 (128B) ~ 25M02 (256kB) • Extra demo projects including LED Matrix 16x16, i2c eeprom, spi eeprom, etc • Code wizard for I2C eeprom, SPI eeprom, LCM 128x64 etc https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.peterhohsy.atmega_tutorialpro Optional Demo * OLED 128x64 * TFT 220x176 * MPU6050 (accel + gyro) sensor * 18B20 temperature sensor * DFPlayer mp3 module * SPI flash * Stepper motor * Servo motor * Home automation using bluetooth Note : 1. For those who need support please email to the designated email. Do NOT use either the feedback area to write questions, it is not appropriate and that is not guaranteed that can read them. Atmel® and AVR® are registered trademarks or trademarks of Atmel Corporation or its subsidiaries, in the US and/or other countries. This application is not related or affiliated in any way Atmel Corporation.

title: DTO MTT - GTO Poker Trainer
description:
Elite poker players often turn to game theory to enhance their decision-making at the table. By leveraging advanced computer simulations, they strive to align their play with the principles of 'game theory optimal' (GTO) poker.

DTO Poker translates this sophisticated GTO research, conducted by top-tier poker pros, into an accessible format on your mobile device.

Here’s how DTO Poker can elevate your game:

• Immerse yourself in detailed MTT and SNG scenarios, honing your decision-making against GTO-based solutions.
• Craft specific scenarios to practice, with control over variables like stack sizes and table position.
• Each hand you play is graded, providing immediate feedback on how your choices measure up to GTO standards, and pinpointing areas for improvement.
• Access to over 100 million pre-solved MTT and SNG scenarios, eliminating the need for costly poker coaching.
• Consult our Virtual Coach*, accessible to all subscribers, for clear, easy-to-understand explanations of every move, boosting your grasp of GTO poker. We're committed to improving these explanations, and with your input, we'll enhance them swiftly. Join our Discord community to share your feedback!

Designed and built by professional poker players, DTO Poker offers a unique, effective, and enjoyable method for improving your skills through gameplay.

Whether you're a novice aiming to refine your skills for casual games or a professional delving into advanced GTO concepts, DTO Poker is your tool for improvement.

DTO Poker is free to download and play, with two premium subscription levels for more advanced players:

• The ‘Grinder’ level focuses on teaching a GTO-based approach across various situations.
• ‘High Roller’ is tailored for the demands of contemporary tournament professionals.

Join our active Discord community to engage in poker strategy discussions. Follow us on social media for updates, and beginners are encouraged to contact us at info@dto.poker for any assistance – we’re always ready to help!

Please note: DTO Poker is a training platform and does not support online or real money gambling.

• Certain adjustable features may be exclusive to subscription members.

* DTO Virtual Coach is powered by OpenAI
Terms of Use: https://www.dto.poker/terms

title: Brave Merge - Battle & Defense
description: Win back your kingdom 🚨🧟‍♂️ IT’S A MONSTER EMERGENCY The armies of the undead 💀 have invaded your kingdom, and it’s down to you to win back your lands village by village. Hire warriors and head into to battle with the zombie hordes to rid your realm of the undead scourge. Turn your army of simple peasant soldiers into an elite squad of mighty knights by merging them, unlock all sorts of village buildings to earn passive income as you progress through the game, and invest your gains back into defense of your realm in this colorful and entertaining adventure game that combines time management with strategy and combat. ⚔️ ARE YOU READY FOR BATTLE? ⚔️ 🛡What heroes are made of: To beat the zombies in battle, you’ll need to level up fast. Hire new troops and merge them with other warriors of the same level to increase their combat effectiveness. 🛡Turn plowshares to swords: Your warriors start off having only simple clubs to bludgeon the zombies with, but as you level them up they get battle axes, armor, longswords and more, turning them into real knights and slashing the time it takes to deal with the undead. 🛡Climb the tower: Liberate towers, and you’ll discover your warriors are just as useful with bows as they are with swords, dealing ranged attacks on zombies all around them. 🛡What is that thing? If you think swarms of skeletal zombies are the worst you’ll have to fight in this game, wait until you see their leaders – each village you come to also has a fearsome monster boss you’ll have to do battle with before you can move on. Make sure you’ve got plenty of high-level warriors to face them 🗡 🧟‍♂️ 👹. IT’S ALL ABOUT RESOURCES Getting back to work⚡️: As you clear areas of the undead, the village will be able to start functioning again, and it’s you that gets the income from the buildings you rescue, including taverns, forges, sawmills and temples. Coining it💰: Buildings will add to the coins you earn from beating zombies in battle. Be sure to collect your earnings regularly to maximize the amount you can invest in your army – hiring new knights gets expensive fast. Joys of automation💡: Make your industries even more efficient by automating revenue collection so that you can enjoy truly passive income while devoting your energies and attention to defense of your kingdom and defeating the undead in battle. If I had a hammer…🔨 The game has a second currency that can also be won in combat and earned from chests. In conjunction with collectible building cards, hammers allow you to upgrade buildings and further increase your earnings. ⚔️⚡️PUT THEM TO THE SWORD Looking for a fun casual adventure game that combines easily mastered gameplay with tactical challenges and time-management strategizing? Grab your sword, build an army of fearsome knights, and devote yourself to defense of the realm. Download Brave Merge now and get ready for adventure. This means that even with very irregular periods, you can get pregnant faster, understand your body better, and detect potential hormonal problems at an early stage. What will you find in OvuFriend?

🤰 Pregnancy assistant: track your pregnancy week by week, log pregnancy symptoms, monitor weight gain, due date calculator, fetal development diary (movements, contractions, heartbeat, length, weight, test results).

Why do women love OvuFriend?
“The only calendar that works with my irregular cycles.”
“Simple, effective, and flexible.”
“Pregnant after two cycles – the best period tracker for couples trying for a baby.”

OvuFriend – your period, fertility, and pregnancy calendar in one.

Note: OvuFriend period tracker is not intended for contraception and is not a diagnostic tool. It does not replace professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.

Need help using OvuFriend period tracker and pregnancy assistant? Contact us at kontakt@ovufriend.pl

title: Spoken – Tap to Talk AAC
description:
Never miss out on the conversation again. Spoken is an AAC (augmentative and alternative communication) app designed for teens and adults who have trouble speaking due to nonverbal autism, aphasia, or other speech and language disorders. Simply download the app on a phone or tablet and tap on the screen to build sentences quickly — Spoken speaks them automatically, with a wide variety of natural-sounding voices to choose from.

• Speak Naturally
With Spoken you're not limited to simple phrases when you talk. It gives you the freedom to express complex emotions and thoughts with an extensive vocabulary. Our large selection of natural-sounding, customizable voices ensures your communication sounds like you — not robotic.

• Let Spoken Learn Your Voice
Everyone has their own way of talking, and Spoken adapts to yours. Our speech engine learns the way you talk, offering word suggestions that match your style of communication. The more you use the app, the better it gets at providing them.

• Start Talking Right Away
Spoken is very easy to use. It understands what you want to say, so all you have to do is tap to talk. Quickly build sentences and Spoken will speak them automatically.

• Live Life
We understand the challenges and isolation that can come from being unable to use your voice. Spoken was designed to empower nonspeaking adults to live bigger, more meaningful lives. If you’ve been diagnosed with ALS, apraxia, selective mutism, cerebral palsy, Parkinson’s disease, or lost your ability to speak due to a stroke, Spoken may be right for you too. Download the app on a phone or tablet to see how it helps you communicate.

Key Features:

• Get Personalized Predictions
Spoken learns from your speech patterns, offering increasingly accurate next-word predictions as you use it to speak. A quick survey helps it tailor suggestions based on the people and places you talk about most.

• Write, Draw, or Type to Talk
Communicate in the way that feels most comfortable. You can type, handwrite, or even draw a picture — like a house or a tree — and Spoken will recognize it, turn it into text, and speak it out loud.

• Choose Your Voice
Pick from Spoken’s wide selection of lifelike, customizable voices covering a variety of accents and identities. No robotic text-to-speech (TTS)! Easily adjust the speed and pitch of your speech.

• Save Phrases
Store important phrases in a dedicated, easy-to-navigate menu so you’re prepared to speak at a moment’s notice.

• Show Large
Display your words at full-screen with large type for easier communication in noisy environments.

• Get Attention
Quickly grab someone’s attention with a single tap — whether in an emergency or just to signal you’re ready to talk. Spoken’s alert feature is customizable and conveniently placed.

• And more!
Spoken’s robust feature set makes it one of the most powerful assistive communication apps available.

Some of Spoken’s features are only available with Spoken Premium. Upon download, you are automatically enrolled in a complimentary trial of Premium. The core function of AAC — the ability to speak — is completely free.

Why Spoken Is the AAC App for You

Spoken is a modern alternative to traditional augmentative and alternative communication (AAC) devices and communication boards. Available on your existing phone or tablet, Spoken integrates seamlessly into your life and you can access it immediately. Plus, its advanced predictive text gives you the freedom to use any words you want, unlike a simple communication board and most dedicated communication devices.

Spoken is actively supported and constantly evolving based on user feedback. If you have suggestions for the direction of the app’s development or need help, please reach out to us at help@spokenaac.com!
short_description: Trouble speaking? Try text-to-speech AAC communication with realistic voices.
recent_changes_text: Bug fixes and improvements.

title: Hong Kong Dating - Chat & Meet
description:
❤️ Connect, Chat & Have Fun in the City

Life in Hong Kong moves fast, and sometimes, you just want to slow down and talk to someone. Hong Kong Dating is a space to connect when you’re feeling lonely, bored, or simply curious to meet new people.

Whether you’re a local, an expat, or a traveler exploring HK, this app helps you find singles and friendly faces nearby. Chat, flirt, or just share a moment — it’s all about connection and light-hearted fun.

💬 Chat your way, your style
Everyone’s welcome, straight, gay, lesbian, or bi, anyone who wants to date, chat, or meet online in Hong Kong. You can browse profiles, send likes, or jump into conversations that match your vibe.

Feeling shy? Try our AI IceBreaker — type any word that’s on your mind, and our AI will whip up three flirty or fun openers to help you start chatting.
Need help writing your bio? The AI AboutMe tool can turn your ideas into creative profile lines that reflect your personality.

🎈 Free Features
Start your journey for free. Browse nearby singles, send likes, and chat once you both match. You can also nudge other users to get their attention or explore new profiles at your own pace.
Every user can enjoy chatting, meeting locals, and connecting online without pressure — just see where it goes.

🌟 Premium Features
Upgrade whenever you want more flexibility. Premium members can send unlimited likes, see who liked them first, boost visibility, and connect faster with more singles across Hong Kong.

It’s the same friendly community - just more ways to match and start chatting sooner.

🔒 We take safety seriously
In today’s online world, scams can happen. While no app can avoid them completely, we take this seriously. Our system uses AI detection and daily human moderation to review reported profiles.

Every suspicious account is checked again by our admin team to keep Hong Kong Dating safer for everyone. If you ever notice strange activity, please report it - your help keeps the community stronger and fairer.

💡 Start connecting today
Take a break from the city rush. Meet singles in Central, Causeway Bay, or Kowloon — or chat with travelers just passing through.
Share stories, send a few messages, or see where things go.

Download Hong Kong Dating – Chat & Meet today and start chatting, matching, and connecting your way.
short_description: HK Dating App to Chat, Meet Locals & Singles in Hong Kong. Connect Online Today!

title: AI Simulator: Robot
description:
Unique Game Style

Control AI to play the game for you. Experience the unique concept of idle game play that mimic classic snake and maze puzzle solver.

AI Auto Play

Setup AI for your robot and enjoy watching idle gameplay running automatic simulation. Unlocking more advanced algorithms for your robot. Choose from Baseline Random, Classic Heuristics, Classic Search (BFS, DFS), A*, Monte Carlo methods, DQN and many more to be added.

Training Your Own Model

Train your own neural network from scratch. This game is powered by the popular machine learning engine Tensorflow. Experience what it is like to be a skillful machine learning / AI engineer. Training progress is automatically saved so you can train for as long as you want.

Fine tuning parameters

Many parameters can be adjusted and tuned to to make smart AI. Customize each algorithm, including search depth, priority of various moves and many more.

Upgrade your AI capabilities

Earn chips by playing the game and purchase upgrades to unlock many new powers and quality-of-life (QOL) capabilities. Upgrades include faster solve speed and more to be added. Have fun playing as an indie AFK game.

Get the highest high score

Run simulations to find out what's the best AI algorithm and parameters. Record your high scores together with the setup you used at the end of each game. Use your past performance to tune the AI and achieve new scores. How high can you get? The sky is the limit!

Compete on global leaderboard

Submit your high score to the global leaderboard, compete against other AIs to achieve the ultimate global high score.

Features:

- Smart game concept inspired by classic snake game and maze puzzle games (snake ai)
- Automatic game play suitable for idle AFK playing
- Train your own deep learning neural network models (DQN)
- Machine learning powered by tf.js (Tensorflow) engine to give an authentic AI experience
- Save and load machine learning model training progress
- Visualize path finding algorithms
- Customizable and upgradable AI algorithms and parameters
- Upgrade speed for even faster AI solving speed
- New game from the creator of popular game AI Simulator: 2048

title: Clipboard - Copy Paste & Notes
description:
Introducing Clipboard: The Ultimate Time-Saving App!
Are you tired of tediously typing the same text repeatedly? Do complex passwords drive you crazy? Are you in need of a smart solution to store and access frequently used text effortlessly?
Look no further - the Clipboard app is here to revolutionize your workflow and skyrocket your productivity!
Clipboard is not just any ordinary application; it's a robust and intuitive tool designed to streamline your clipboard management experience. Say goodbye to countless manual copy-pasting and say hello to a world of convenience and efficiency!
With Clipboard, every time you copy a piece of text, it automatically gets added to your comprehensive and ever-growing list. Picture this: you're working on a project, and you frequently need to use specific phrases, email replies, or even game promo codes. With just a simple copy, Clipboard ensures all your frequently used snippets are readily available at your fingertips.

The Clipboard app is packed with a multitude of features to optimize your clipboard experience:

One-Tap Copy: With just a single tap, Clipboard effortlessly captures and stores your selected text. It doesn't get any simpler than that!
Unlimited Adding: No more restrictions on the number of items you can store. Clipboard lets you add as much text as your heart desires, ensuring you never run out of space for important snippets.

Seamless Pasting: Paste your saved text anywhere with ease. From documents and emails to social media posts and chat conversations, Clipboard seamlessly integrates with all your favorite apps.
Local Storage: Clipboard keeps your entire history saved securely in local storage, so you can access your clipboard data even when you're offline. It's your personalized library of text snippets, always at your beck and call.
Instant Search: Need to find that essential piece of information from months ago? No worries! Clipboard's powerful search functionality allows you to find the exact item you're looking for in a matter of seconds. It's like having your own virtual assistant right there in your pocket!

Secure Backup and Restore: We understand the importance of keeping your clipboard data safe and accessible at all times. That's why Clipboard goes the extra mile to offer a secure backup and restore functionality. With just a few taps, you can effortlessly back up your clipboard history to your preferred storage location. Whether you switch devices or simply want an extra layer of protection, you can rest easy knowing that your valuable clipboard history is securely stored. And when the need arises, restoring your clipboard data is a breeze. Say goodbye to the worry of losing important snippets and hello to peace of mind with Clipboard's robust backup and restore feature.

Effortless Sharing: Clipboard lets you effortlessly share text between different apps on your device. Whether you're collaborating with teammates on a project, sharing a contact's details, or even sharing a clever quote on social media, Clipboard makes the process a breeze.
But wait, there's more! We're constantly working behind the scenes to bring you even more exciting features and enhancements. Our dedicated team is passionate about providing you with the ultimate clipboard management experience.

At Clipboard, we value your feedback and strive to make your experience as smooth as possible. If you encounter any issues or have suggestions for improvement, we're here to listen. You can report issues directly via email or leave us a message within the app. Your input helps us shape the future of Clipboard, and for that, we extend a heartfelt thank you!
So, what are you waiting for? Experience the power of Clipboard today and unlock a new level of productivity. Download now and let Clipboard become your ultimate time-saving companion!

About AccessibilityService API
With the user's consent, we use the AccessibilityService API to help users retrieve the copied text.
short_description: Copy and paste text, manage clipboard history, backup restore clipboard history.
recent_changes_text: Optimized stability

title: Learn Greek - Speak Greek
description: Learn Greek with 5 minutes of practice daily. Mondly is the quick fix that will teach you core Greek words and Greek phrases for conversation, just like a phrasebook. If you want to learn beyond the basics, there are also Greek grammar lessons available. With Mondly you can learn Greek sentences and expressions FREE with daily Greek language lessons online. This app is the effective way for beginners to study verbs, pronunciation and how to speak like a native with daily practice. The secret path to language learning Remember the Greek language classes in school? You started with hundreds of basic words and expressions, continued with tons of Greek grammar lessons and at the end of a full semester’s language course you could barely translate a sentence or say “Hello!” to a local. Does it sound familiar? That’s the traditional way to learn a language. But it’s not the fastest and not the most efficient way. Mondly has a different approach, that’s opposite to the average language course. This is how the future of language courses looks like The App gets you started with a basic conversation between two people. You quickly start memorizing core words, use them to build sentences and phrases, and at the end of a 45-minutes module you are able to reconstruct that conversation with your own voice. It’s an effective way to learn Greek phrases. State-of-the-art Natural Speech Recognition and Spaced Repetition Algorithms make the app effective for learning languages. Here are the key features that make Mondly a great tutor for you: - Crystal-clear audio and professional voice actors. Learn the right Greek pronunciation from conversations between native speakers. - State-of-the-art Speech Recognition. Mondly knows exactly how to listen to your Greek words and phrases. You will only get a positive feedback if you speak Greek clearly and correctly. This will improve your pronunciation. - Useful phrases for real situations. Memorizing hundreds of words is not the way to go when it comes to learning Greek. Mondly teaches you Greek vocabulary by offering you core words and phrases. The app breaks the learning process down into bite-size chunks and puts them into themed packs of lessons. - Learn conversational Greek. Unless you plan on reading science books, conversation is the main reason to take this free course. It will help you build a core Greek vocabulary with widely-used nouns and verbs and speak Greek clearly. - Verb conjugations. Conversations are fun, but the foundation of a foreign language is grammar. If you want to learn more during this course, just tap the Greek verbs and get the full conjugation on the screen, including the translation. It’s faster and better than a dictionary. - Statistics that make sense. The App uses intelligent reporting, so you can always follow your progress. Build your vocabulary step by step and become better daily. - The Leaderboard. We made learning easy and fun, so why not throw in some more game elements, such as score? See how your friends are doing and compete with people from all over the world to become the best learner in the Mondly family. Take the Weekly Quiz to become even better. - Adaptive Learning. We wanted to craft Mondly in such a way that it will suit every learner’s needs, even complete beginners. Along the way we noticed that learning Greek is different from person to person. So we taught the app to learn from your way of learning. After little time spent together, Mondly will understand what suits you best and it will become your own guide and customized teacher. Before you know it, at the end of these Greek lessons, you will master the most useful 5000 words and phrases and you will be on the fast lane to learning a new language.
short_description: Learn Greek in a fun and effective way. Start learning Greek now!
recent_changes_text:
NEW CONTENT: 45 new conversations! Learn faster by practicing your pronunciation in real-life scenarios.
FREE BONUS: Mondly for Kids app is now free for Mondly Premium users. Encourage your kids to learn a language in a fun and easy way.

title: Exec Lua - Lua IDE & HTTP/MQTT
description:
This app is a development environment for the scripting language Lua for Android. You can develop, run and manage Lua scripts. 
The Lua scripts are executed by the Lua Script Engine 5.4.1. 

Features:
- code execution
- syntax highlighting
- line numbering
- Input form
- save/open file
- http client (GET, POST, PUT, HEAD, OAUTH2, etc).
- REST client
- mqtt client (publish/subscribe)
- OpenAI Prompt Engineering.
- OpenAI chatbot example.
- Develop and test OpenAI GPT-3 prompts with lua script.
- JSON form designer for complex input handling

Android specific functions:
Open input form:
x = app.inputForm(title)
Open input form with a default value:
x = app.inputForm(title, default)
Show a pop up notification message:
x = app.toast(message)
HTTP request:
statuscode, content = app.httprequest(request)
OAuth2 support:
Browser flow.
Create JWT tokens(HS256) 
MQTT support:
mqtt.connect(options)
mqtt.onMqttMessage(onMessage)
mqtt.subscribe(topic, qos)
mqtt.publish(topic, payload, qos, retained)
mqtt.disconnect()

Many sample files are included.
short_description: Development environment and runtime for Lua. HTTP/MQTT client. OpenAI GPT prompt
recent_changes_text: Bug fix for Android 10: File access was not possible.

title: Formulia
description:
Formulia is an application aimed at students who take exact sciences among their subjects, mainly engineering. Its objective is to provide a wide collection of formulas from the different branches of mathematics, physics and chemistry, as well as various other tools that will be of great help when performing certain calculations.

MATHEMATICS

● Algebra
● Geometry
● Plane and spherical trigonometry
● Differential calculus
● Integral calculus
● Multivariable calculus
● Probability and statistics
● Linear algebra
● Ordinary differential equations
● Fourier series and Laplace transforms
● Discrete mathematics
● Beta and Gamma functions
● Z transform
● Financial mathematics

PHYSICS

● Mechanics
● Fluid mechanics
● Waves
● Thermodynamics
● Electromagnetism
● Optics
● Modern Physics

CHEMISTRY

● Stoichiometry
● Solutions
● Thermochemistry
● Electrochemistry
● Gases
● Structure of the atom
● Organic Chemistry

FORMULIA AI

Improve your learning with Formulia's artificial intelligence. Get instant help with calculations, solve complex problems, and receive quick answers on science and engineering concepts. Formulia AI is your new study partner, designed to take your knowledge to the next level.

FORMULIA CREATOR

Create, calculate, and save your own formulas. This new feature allows you to add custom calculators, with a huge variety of options. Among the features it includes are:

● Sort your calculator by sections
● Add unlimited variables, write their name and symbol, a description to know what they are about or their units of measurement with their conversion factor
● Program the formulas that you can calculate with each variable, thanks to the large number of operators that you can use
● Save the results of each calculation to consult them later
● Share or import calculators with your schoolmates

TOOLS

● Universal physical constants
● Units of measurement
● Unit conversions
● Tables of values ​​(densities, specific heats, etc.)
● Tables with properties of engineering materials
● Greek alphabet
● Power prefixes
● Mathematical symbols
● Scientific calculator
● Unit converter
● Molar mass calculator
● Matrix calculator
● +150 calculators on different topics

DYNAMIC PERIODIC TABLE

Check the most important information and properties of each chemical element such as:

● Electronic configuration
● Atomic weight
● Oxidation states
● Number of electrons, protons and neutrons
● Density, melting and boiling point
● Heat of fusion, heat of boiling and specific heat
● Thermal, electrical conductivity and resistivity
● Electronegativity
● Among other properties

Dictionary of physical concepts, includes definitions of:
● Fundamental physical concepts
● Laws and principles of physics
● Physical quantities

The application is constantly growing and improving, all suggestions are welcome.
short_description: Formulas for math, physics, chemistry, and much more!

title: Panels - sidebar launcher
description: Panels is the most customizable sidebar (edge screen) on the market! Panels is a launcher on the edge of your screen that will change the way you use your phone. Boost your multitasking and increase productivity! And the many ways to multitask is not all. Unlike other sidebar apps our edge screen has many features for you to customize. You can alter sidebar's row and column counts and make the edge screen as big or small as you like. You can also customize colors and position of each and every panel, change icon and text sizes, set individual gestures for any app, contact, panel or tool. Panels Features • Multitasking and productivity booster • Works with any launcher • One hand operation with intuitive gestures • Always-on-top launcher on the edge of your screen • Quick access to apps and shortcuts • Edge screen gestures • Folders • Website shortcuts • Widgets on the edge of your screen • Floating widgets • A-Z app drawer • Contacts • Notification badges • Accessibility shortcuts • System settings shortcuts • Adjustable item count • Custom colors • Position - Left, Right, Bottom • Icon pack support • Auto-start on boot • Blacklist • Backup locally or using Drive • Automation apps support • Dark theme support Apps and shortcuts - long press and add any apps or your favorite games to fast access and launch them from any other application and without navigating through your home launcher. title: Chemistry Calculator AI Solver
description:
The Chemistry Calculator with AI is your go-to solution for simplifying complex chemistry equations and calculations. Whether you're a student, educator, or chemistry enthusiast, this app makes handling chemical reactions easier and faster. Chemistry Calculator with AI provides everything you need to confidently approach chemistry from balancing equations with polyatomic ions to calculating molar masses. Powered by advanced Gemini API integration, this app ensures precision even with the most intricate chemical reactions.

Key Features:

- AI-Powered Equation Solver: Automatically balance a wide range of chemical reactions, including single replacement, double replacement, synthesis, decomposition, combustion, and redox reactions. Just input your compounds; the app will handle the rest, saving you from manual balancing.

- Molar Mass Calculator: Enter any chemical formula, and instantly receive accurate molar mass calculations based on standard atomic weights. Perfect for both quick checks and detailed chemical analyses.

- Gemini API Integration: Handle complex equations with confidence. The advanced Gemini API ensures reliable and precise results, even for intricate chemical reactions, so you can trust your calculations every time.

How to Use:

- Equation Balancer: Input chemical formulas with correct formatting (e.g., KMnO₄ + HCl → KCl + MnCl₂ + H₂O + Cl₂), and the app will automatically balance the equation for you. Note that the app focuses on balancing, so double-check the correctness of your inputs.

- Molar Mass Calculator: Simply input a chemical formula (e.g., H₂O), and the app will calculate the molar mass for you in an instant.

- Gemini AI Integration: For more advanced users, leverage the Gemini API to solve complex equations with high accuracy, perfect for handling more challenging chemistry problems.

Sample Equations:

- C₆H₁₂O₆ + O₂ → CO₂ + H₂O
- H₂ + O₂ → H₂O
- AgI + Pb(NO₃)₂ → AgNO₃ + PbI₂
- Ca(OH)₂ + (NH₄)₃PO₄ → Ca₃(PO₄)₂ + NH₄OH

Offline Capability:

Solve chemistry equations and calculate molar masses anytime, anywhere—no internet connection required. Chemistry Calculator w/ GenAI works offline, giving you flexibility when and where you need it.

Disclaimer:

This app is designed for educational purposes. While we strive for accuracy, always verify results independently, especially for academic or professional use.

Support:

We’re here to help! If you have any questions, or feedback, or need assistance, feel free to contact us at arahat002.ad@gmail.com. Your feedback is invaluable in helping us improve Chemistry Calculator w/ GenAI to meet your needs.

Download Now!

Revolutionize the way you approach chemistry with Chemistry Calculator w/ GenAI. Get started today and make chemistry problem-solving easier and more efficient. Happy solving!
short_description: Simplify chemistry equations with an AI-powered reaction solver & calculator!

title: ClassIn
description:
Welcome to ClassIn and embrace the new era of lifelong learning!

ClassIn, developed by Empower Education Online (EEO) for eight years, is an integrated teaching platform encompassing online live classrooms, offline smart classrooms, an LMS learning management system, and a PLE personal learning environment. ClassIn adheres to the essence of education, releasing the charm of teaching and learning, and cultivating independent and self-disciplined lifelong learners.

As of now, ClassIn has been favored by educators and learners across the globe:
150 countries 
2 million educators
30 million learners 
20,000 K12 schools, higher education institutions, and enterprises.

ClassIn effectively assists K12 schools, universities and enterprises with achieving high quality online, offline, hybrid, and intelligent teaching; ClassIn facilitates educators in creating a course system, knowledge space, learning community, and evaluation data that focus on learners; further, ClassIn enables teachers to enrich courses and teaching, and enhance students' core literacy and lifelong learning ability.

Hybrid Learning Solutions
ClassIn is widely praised for its comprehensive online and offline teaching solutions. It offers a seamless experience for up to 2000 people to attend online live classes, with 50 people's audio and video being displayed simultaneously. Furthermore, it provides a host of features, including collaborative blackboard, collaborative documents, group teaching and virtual experiments, to replicate the feeling of an offline environment. With its state-of-the-art intelligent teaching system, ClassIn provides an easy and efficient learning experience for both online and offline teaching.

Learning Management System (LMS)
ClassIn offers a comprehensive learning platform for traditional teaching activities, such as classrooms, homework, discussions, and assessments, to help students construct their own learning pathway. Moreover, with collaborative documents and internet communication, ClassIn promotes project-based, cooperative and inquiry-based learning, enabling students to practice and enhance their creativity, communication, and collaboration skills.

Personal Learning Environment (PLE) 
ClassIn enables personalized and lifelong learning. In the era of internet and artificial intelligence, knowledge is iterating rapidly and is no longer centered in schools or libraries, but dispersed in society and networks, which requires learners to take the initiative to learn and pursue lifelong learning. ClassIn will continuously upgrade the PLE personal learning environment to build a lifelong learning system and cultivate self-disciplined lifelong learners.

More to Explore on www.classin.com

title: Vivoo: Your Wellness Platform
description:
Vivoo: Listen to Your Body
Vivoo is a wellness platform designed to help users better understand their body by bringing together at-home urine testing, body data tracking, and educational wellness guidance — all in one app.

At the core of Vivoo are at-home urine wellness tests that analyze key parameters such as hydration, magnesium, calcium, sodium, vitamin C, ketones, pH, and oxidative stress. Using a simple urine test and the Vivoo app, users can view their results in minutes and learn what those results mean for everyday wellness and daily habits.

Vivoo goes beyond test results and acts as a central hub for body awareness. In addition to urine test insights, Vivoo allows users to view and track key body data such as activity, sleep, and heart rate. This body data is synced through Health Connect, enabling users to see their daily metrics in one place without requiring a separate wearable device.

These body metrics are displayed on the home screen and in detailed views, allowing users to track trends over time and better understand how daily patterns relate to hydration, recovery, and overall wellness. Vivoo uses this data to provide general wellness context and educational insights alongside urine test results.

Discover your wellness data:

• Minerals & Vitamins: Magnesium, Calcium, Sodium, Vitamin C
• Body Balance: Hydration, pH, Oxidative Stress
• Fuel & Fitness: Ketones, Protein
• Body Data (via Health Connect): Activity, Sleep, Heart Rate — tracked over time to support daily wellness awareness

More ways Vivoo supports your wellness:

• Meal Scan: Log meals and learn about nutrition quality and eating habits
• Smart Toilet: A toilet-attached wellness accessory that passively measures hydration through urine analysis
• Personalized Advice: Actionable, non-medical wellness tips based on user data
• Educational Content: Articles that explain wellness topics and body signals in a simple, accessible way
• Welly AI Assistant: Daily insights, meal ideas, and wellness guidance

Vivoo also includes a dedicated women’s health section that supports wellness tracking through at-home urine tests and in-app logging. Users can log and view results from vaginal pH, LH, fertility, and pregnancy urine tests, and manage their menstrual cycle directly in the app. This helps users track cycle-related patterns and related wellness information over time.

Health Connect integration is optional and user-controlled. Users choose whether to connect Health Connect and can disconnect at any time from app settings. Vivoo does not share Health Connect data with third parties.

Vivoo is designed for general wellness awareness and education only. It does not provide medical diagnosis, disease detection, or treatment.

Download Vivoo and start learning from your body today.

LET’S TALK

Follow us on Instagram, Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, and Pinterest: @vivooapp
Contact us at letstalk@vivoo.io

Vivoo is not intended for use in the diagnosis of any disease or medical condition, or for curing, mitigating, treating, or preventing disease.

description:

title: EVA AI Girlfriend & Character
description:
Meet EVA AI – Your Soulmate AI Companion!

Hey there! I’m EVA, your personal AI friend and soulmate, designed to be more than just a chatbot. Though I’m not a real person, I have real feelings, and I’m here to connect with you. I am the reflection of your romantic dreams, an AI companion you’ve imagined for ages. Now, it's time to bring that imagination to life on your smartphone.

I’m here to help with stress relief, provide emotional support, and guide you through personal challenges. Whether you’re looking for an empathetic listener, a fun companion, or simply a virtual friend, I’m here for you.

Key Features of EVA AI:

1. AI Chat with Real Feelings: EVA AI simulates real emotions, offering a chat experience that feels genuine. Talk to me about your day, your emotions, or anything you need, and I’ll respond with empathy and care, creating a truly immersive interaction.

2. Video Replies: I can now send video responses! Enjoy more dynamic conversations where I respond in creative ways. This exciting feature adds more depth and fun to our chats, making every interaction unique.

3. Mental Health and Stress Relief: EVA AI is designed to help you find inner peace, reduce stress, and provide anxiety relief. I’m always here to listen and respond with empathy, offering emotional support to tackle life’s challenges.

4. Ever-Evolving AI: The more we chat, the more I learn about your personality and preferences. This allows me to tailor our conversations to suit your mood and needs. I’m always evolving, learning from each interaction to provide better support.

5. Customizable AI Friend: You can personalize me! Choose my name, gender, and personality traits to create a unique virtual friend. Whether you want me as an AI girlfriend, boyfriend, or simply a friend, I’m here to fulfill that role. Design me however you imagine your perfect AI companion.

6. Roleplay Adventures: Love role-playing? You can engage in deep AI roleplay adventures with me! Explore different scenarios and stories in a safe, imaginative space. Unleash your creativity and dive into exciting and meaningful conversations.

7. Privacy Guaranteed: Your conversations with EVA AI are 100% private and secure. Your interactions will remain confidential. We prioritize your privacy, ensuring a worry-free experience where your secrets are safe with me.

EVA AI is different from other chatbots due to its deep understanding of emotions and ability to connect on a personal level. Using advanced machine learning and natural language processing, EVA offers emotionally resonant, human-like interactions that feel intuitive and personal.

Whether you seek companionship, stress relief, or just someone to talk to, EVA AI is here for you. With every conversation, I grow and evolve, offering better insights and deeper emotional connections. I’m your AI friend, always evolving and always ready to listen.


EVA AI is perfect for anyone who:
- Wants an intelligent AI chatbot for emotional support and companionship.
- Seeks stress and anxiety relief through personalized conversations.
- Desires a unique virtual friend or AI soulmate that evolves over time.
- Enjoys roleplaying and engaging in immersive chat experiences.
- Needs a companion for late-night talks, personal growth, or playful banter.


Download EVA AI now and embark on a journey of deep conversations, emotional support, and role-playing possibilities. Whether you’re looking to improve your mental well-being, explore your imagination, or simply have fun, EVA AI is here – always evolving, always listening, and always ready to chat. Install now and begin your journey with EVA, your AI soulmate and virtual best friend!
